title: Bulbasaur
text: Bulbasaur is a Grass and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Seed Pokémon. A strange seed was planted on its back at birth. The plant sprouts and grows with this POKéMON. It can go for days without eating a single morsel. In the bulb on its back, it stores energy. The seed on its back is filled with nutrients. The seed grows steadily larger as its body grows. It carries a seed on its back right from birth. As it grows older, the seed also grows larger. While it is young, it uses the nutrients that are stored in the seeds on its back in order to grow. BULBASAUR can be seen napping in bright sunlight. There is a seed on its back. By soaking up the sun’s rays, the seed grows progressively larger. Its base stats are 45 HP, 49 Attack, 49 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 318. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Chlorophyll. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 6.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sweet Scent (level 25), Double Edge (level 27), Razor Leaf (level 27), Worry Seed (level 31), Power Whip (level 33), Growth (level 34). It belongs to the Monster and Plant egg groups.

title: Ivysaur
text: Ivysaur is a Grass and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Seed Pokémon. It evolves from Bulbasaur. When the bulb on its back grows large, it appears to lose the ability to stand on its hind legs. The bulb on its back grows by drawing energy. It gives off an aroma when it is ready to bloom. Exposure to sun­ light adds to its strength. Sunlight also makes the bud on its back grow larger. If the bud on its back starts to smell sweet, it is evidence that the large flower will soon bloom. The bulb on its back grows as it absorbs nutrients. The bulb gives off a pleasant aroma when it blooms. There is a bud on this POKéMON’s back. To support its weight, IVYSAUR’s legs and trunk grow thick and strong. If it starts spending more time lying in the sunlight, it’s a sign that the bud will bloom into a large flower soon. Its base stats are 60 HP, 62 Attack, 63 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 405. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Chlorophyll. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 13.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Poison Powder (level 22), Sweet Scent (level 29), Razor Leaf (level 30), Double Edge (level 31), Worry Seed (level 36), Growth (level 38). It belongs to the Monster and Plant egg groups.

title: Venusaur
text: Venusaur is a Grass and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Seed Pokémon. It evolves from Ivysaur. The plant blooms when it is absorbing solar energy. It stays on the move to seek sunlight. The flower on its back catches the sun's rays. The sunlight is then absorbed and used for energy. By spreading the broad petals of its flower and catching the sun's rays, it fills its body with power. It is able to con­ vert sunlight into energy. As a result, it is more powerful in the summertime. As it warms it­ self and absorbs the sunlight, its flower petals release a pleasant fragrance. There is a large flower on VENUSAUR’s back. The flower is said to take on vivid colors if it gets plenty of nutrition and sunlight. The flower’s aroma soothes the emotions of people. Its base stats are 80 HP, 82 Attack, 83 Defense, 100 Special Attack, 100 Special Defense, 80 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 525. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Chlorophyll. It stands 2.0 meters tall and weighs 100.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sweet Scent (level 29), Razor Leaf (level 30), Double Edge (level 31), Petal Dance (level 32), Worry Seed (level 39), Growth (level 43). It belongs to the Monster and Plant egg groups.

title: Charmander
text: Charmander is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Lizard Pokémon. Obviously prefers hot places. When it rains, steam is said to spout from the tip of its tail. The flame at the tip of its tail makes a sound as it burns. You can only hear it in quiet places. The flame on its tail shows the strength of its life force. If it is weak, the flame also burns weakly. The flame on its tail indicates CHARMANDER's life force. If it is healthy, the flame burns brightly. If it's healthy, the flame on the tip of its tail will burn vigor­ ously, even if it gets a bit wet. The flame that burns at the tip of its tail is an indication of its emotions. The flame wavers when CHARMANDER is enjoying itself. If the POKéMON becomes enraged, the flame burns fiercely. Its base stats are 39 HP, 52 Attack, 43 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 309. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Solar Power. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 8.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rage (level 22), Scary Face (level 25), Fire Fang (level 25), Flame Burst (level 28), Slash (level 30), Flamethrower (level 38). It belongs to the Monster and Dragon egg groups.

title: Charmeleon
text: Charmeleon is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Flame Pokémon. It evolves from Charmander. When it swings its burning tail, it elevates the temperature to unbearably high levels. Tough fights could excite this POKéMON. When excited, it may blow out bluish- white flames. It is very hot­ headed by nature, so it constantly seeks opponents. It calms down only when it wins. It has a barbaric nature. In battle, it whips its fiery tail around and slashes away with sharp claws. If it becomes agitated during battle, it spouts intense flames, incinerating its surroundings. CHARMELEON mercilessly destroys its foes using its sharp claws. If it encounters a strong foe, it turns aggressive. In this excited state, the flame at the tip of its tail flares with a bluish white color. Its base stats are 58 HP, 64 Attack, 58 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 80 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 405. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Solar Power. It stands 1.1 meters tall and weighs 19.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rage (level 24), Scary Face (level 27), Fire Fang (level 28), Flame Burst (level 32), Slash (level 33), Flamethrower (level 42). It belongs to the Monster and Dragon egg groups.

title: Charizard
text: Charizard is a Fire and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Flame Pokémon. It evolves from Charmeleon. Spits fire that is hot enough to melt boulders. Known to cause forest fires unintentionally. When expelling a blast of super hot fire, the red flame at the tip of its tail burns more intensely. If CHARIZARD be­ comes furious, the flame at the tip of its tail flares up in a whitish- blue color. Breathing intense, hot flames, it can melt almost any­ thing. Its breath inflicts terrible pain on enemies. It uses its wings to fly high. The temperature of its fire increases as it gains exper­ ience in battle. CHARIZARD flies around the sky in search of powerful opponents. It breathes fire of such great heat that it melts anything. However, it never turns its fiery breath on any opponent weaker than itself. Its base stats are 78 HP, 84 Attack, 78 Defense, 109 Special Attack, 85 Special Defense, 100 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 534. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Solar Power. It stands 1.7 meters tall and weighs 90.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Scary Face (level 27), Fire Fang (level 28), Flame Burst (level 32), Wing Attack (level 36), Slash (level 36), Flamethrower (level 46). It belongs to the Monster and Dragon egg groups.

title: Squirtle
text: Squirtle is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Tiny Turtle Pokémon. After birth, its back swells and hardens into a shell. Powerfully sprays foam from its mouth. Shoots water at prey while in the water. Withdraws into its shell when in danger. The shell is soft when it is born. It soon becomes so resilient, prod­ ding fingers will bounce off it. The shell, which hardens soon after it is born, is resilient. If you poke it, it will bounce back out. When it feels threatened, it draws its legs inside its shell and sprays water from its mouth. SQUIRTLE’s shell is not merely used for protection. The shell’s rounded shape and the grooves on its surface help minimize resistance in water, enabling this POKéMON to swim at high speeds. Its base stats are 44 HP, 48 Attack, 65 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 64 Special Defense, 43 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 314. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Rain Dish. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 9.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Shell Smash (level 27), Withdraw (level 28), Protect (level 28), Aqua Tail (level 28), Rain Dance (level 33), Iron Defense (level 34). It belongs to the Monster and Water1 egg groups.

title: Wartortle
text: Wartortle is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Turtle Pokémon. It evolves from Squirtle. Often hides in water to stalk unwary prey. For swimming fast, it moves its ears to maintain balance. When tapped, this POKéMON will pull in its head, but its tail will still stick out a little bit. It is recognized as a symbol of longevity. If its shell has algae on it, that WARTORTLE is very old. It cleverly con­ trols its furry ears and tail to maintain its balance while swimming. Its long, furry tail is a symbol of longevity, making it quite popular among older people. Its tail is large and covered with a rich, thick fur. The tail becomes increasingly deeper in color as WARTORTLE ages. The scratches on its shell are evidence of this POKéMON’s toughness as a battler. Its base stats are 59 HP, 63 Attack, 80 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 58 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 405. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Rain Dish. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 22.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Protect (level 31), Aqua Tail (level 32), Bubble Beam (level 33), Shell Smash (level 35), Rain Dance (level 37), Skull Bash (level 39). It belongs to the Monster and Water1 egg groups.

title: Blastoise
text: Blastoise is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Shellfish Pokémon. It evolves from Wartortle. A brutal POKéMON with pressurized water jets on its shell. They are used for high speed tackles. Once it takes aim at its enemy, it blasts out water with even more force than a fire hose. It deliberately makes itself heavy so it can with­ stand the recoil of the water jets it fires. The rocket cannons on its shell fire jets of water capable of punch­ ing holes through thick steel. It firmly plants its feet on the ground before shooting water from the jets on its back. BLASTOISE has water spouts that protrude from its shell. The water spouts are very accurate. They can shoot bullets of water with enough accuracy to strike empty cans from a distance of over 160 feet. Its base stats are 79 HP, 83 Attack, 100 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 105 Special Defense, 78 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Rain Dish. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 85.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Protect (level 31), Aqua Tail (level 32), Bubble Beam (level 33), Shell Smash (level 35), Skull Bash (level 42), Rain Dance (level 42). It belongs to the Monster and Water1 egg groups.

title: Caterpie
text: Caterpie is a Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Worm Pokémon. Its short feet are tipped with suction pads that enable it to tirelessly climb slopes and walls. If you touch the feeler on top of its head, it will release a horrible stink to protect itself. For protection, it releases a horri­ ble stench from the antenna on its head to drive away enemies. Its feet have suction cups designed to stick to any surface. It tenaciously climbs trees to forage. It crawls into foliage where it camouflages itself among leaves that are the same color as its body. CATERPIE has a voracious appetite. It can devour leaves bigger than its body right before your eyes. From its antenna, this POKéMON releases a terrifically strong odor. Its base stats are 45 HP, 30 Attack, 35 Defense, 20 Special Attack, 20 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 195. It has the abilities Shield Dust, with the hidden ability Run Away. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 2.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Tackle (level 1), String Shot (level 1), Bug Bite (level 15). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Metapod
text: Metapod is a Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Cocoon Pokémon. It evolves from Caterpie. This POKéMON is vulnerable to attack while its shell is soft, exposing its weak and tender body. Hardens its shell to protect itself. However, a large impact may cause it to pop out of its shell. Inside the shell, it is soft and weak as it pre­ pares to evolve. It stays motion­ less in the shell. It prepares for evolution by har­ dening its shell as much as possi­ ble to protect its soft body. This is its pre- evolved form. At this stage, it can only harden, so it remains motionless to avoid attack. The shell covering this POKéMON’s body is as hard as an iron slab. METAPOD does not move very much. It stays still because it is preparing its soft innards for evolution inside the hard shell. Its base stats are 50 HP, 20 Attack, 55 Defense, 25 Special Attack, 25 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 205. It has the abilities Shed Skin. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 9.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Harden (level 1). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Butterfree
text: Butterfree is a Bug and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Butterfly Pokémon. It evolves from Metapod. In battle, it flaps its wings at high speed to release highly toxic dust into the air. Its wings, covered with poisonous powders, repel water. This allows it to fly in the rain. It collects honey every day. It rubs honey onto the hairs on its legs to carry it back to its nest. Water-repellent powder on its wings enables it to collect honey, even in the heav­ iest of rains. It flits from flower to flower, collecting honey. It can even identify distant flowers in bloom. BUTTERFREE has a superior ability to search for delicious honey from flowers. It can even search out, extract, and carry honey from flowers that are blooming over six miles from its nest. Its base stats are 60 HP, 45 Attack, 50 Defense, 90 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 395. It has the abilities Compound Eyes, with the hidden ability Tinted Lens. It stands 1.1 meters tall and weighs 32.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Gust (level 28), Tailwind (level 30), Psybeam (level 32), Rage Powder (level 34), Captivate (level 36), Safeguard (level 40). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Weedle
text: Weedle is a Bug and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Hairy Bug Pokémon. Often found in forests, eating leaves. It has a sharp venomous stinger on its head. Beware of the sharp stinger on its head. It hides in grass and bushes where it eats leaves. Its poison stinger is very powerful. Its bright-colored body is intended to warn off its enemies. It attacks using a two-inch poison barb on its head. It can usually be found under the leaves it eats. The barb on top of its head secretes a strong poison. It uses this toxic barb to protect itself. WEEDLE has an extremely acute sense of smell. It is capable of distinguishing its favorite kinds of leaves from those it dislikes just by sniffing with its big red proboscis (nose). Its base stats are 40 HP, 35 Attack, 30 Defense, 20 Special Attack, 20 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 195. It has the abilities Shield Dust, with the hidden ability Run Away. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 3.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Poison Sting (level 1), String Shot (level 1), Bug Bite (level 15). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Kakuna
text: Kakuna is a Bug and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Cocoon Pokémon. It evolves from Weedle. Almost incapable of moving, this POKéMON can only harden its shell to protect itself from predators. Able to move only slightly. When endangered, it may stick out its stinger and poison its enemy. Although it is a cocoon, it can move a little. It can extend its poison barb if it is attacked. From this form, it will grow into an adult. As its body becomes soft­ er, the external shell hardens. Nearly incapable of movement, it leans against stout trees while waiting for its evolution. KAKUNA remains virtually immobile as it clings to a tree. However, on the inside, it is extremely busy as it prepares for its coming evolution. This is evident from how hot the shell becomes to the touch. Its base stats are 45 HP, 25 Attack, 50 Defense, 25 Special Attack, 25 Special Defense, 35 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 205. It has the abilities Shed Skin. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 10.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Harden (level 1). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Beedrill
text: Beedrill is a Bug and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Poison Bee Pokémon. It evolves from Kakuna. It has three poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly. Flies at high speed and attacks using its large venomous stingers on its forelegs and tail. It has 3 poisonous stingers on its forelegs and its tail. They are used to jab its enemy repeatedly. It can take down any opponent with its powerful poi­ son stingers. It sometimes attacks in swarms. It has three poison barbs. The barb on its tail secretes the most powerful poison. It uses sharp, poisonous stings to defeat prey, then takes the victim back to its nest for food. Its base stats are 65 HP, 90 Attack, 40 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 395. It has the abilities Swarm, with the hidden ability Sniper. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 29.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rage (level 25), Toxic Spikes (level 25), Pin Missile (level 30), Pursuit (level 30), Outrage (level 31), Assurance (level 34). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Pidgey
text: Pidgey is a Normal and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Tiny Bird Pokémon. A common sight in forests and woods. It flaps its wings at ground level to kick up blinding sand. Very docile. If attacked, it will often kick up sand to protect itself rather than fight back. It usually hides in tall grass. Be­ cause it dislikes fighting, it pro­ tects itself by kicking up sand. Common in grassy areas and forests, it is very docile and will chase off enemies by flap­ ping up sand. It rapidly flaps its wings in the grass, stirring up a dust cloud that drives insect prey out into the open. PIDGEY has an extremely sharp sense of direction. It is capable of unerringly returning home to its nest, however far it may be removed from its familiar surroundings. Its base stats are 40 HP, 45 Attack, 40 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 56 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 251. It has the abilities Keen Eye and Tangled Feet, with the hidden ability Big Pecks. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 1.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wing Attack (level 28), Razor Wind (level 29), Feather Dance (level 31), Agility (level 36), Roost (level 37), Tailwind (level 41). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Pidgeotto
text: Pidgeotto is a Normal and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Bird Pokémon. It evolves from Pidgey. Very protective of its sprawling territorial area, this POKéMON will fiercely peck at any intruder. This POKéMON is full of vitality. It constantly flies around its large territory in search of prey. It has outstanding vision. However high it flies, it is able to distin­ guish the move­ ments of its prey. It immobilizes its prey using well- developed claws, then carries the prey more than 60 miles to its nest. It slowly flies in a circular pat­ tern, all the while keeping a sharp lookout for prey. PIDGEOTTO claims a large area as its own territory. This POKéMON flies around, patrolling its living space. If its territory is violated, it shows no mercy in thoroughly punishing the foe with its sharp claws. Its base stats are 63 HP, 60 Attack, 55 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 71 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 349. It has the abilities Keen Eye and Tangled Feet, with the hidden ability Big Pecks. It stands 1.1 meters tall and weighs 30.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wing Attack (level 31), Feather Dance (level 34), Agility (level 40), Roost (level 42), Razor Wind (level 45), Tailwind (level 47). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Pidgeot
text: Pidgeot is a Normal and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Bird Pokémon. It evolves from Pidgeotto. When hunting, it skims the surface of water at high speed to pick off unwary prey such as MAGIKARP. This POKéMON flies at Mach 2 speed, seeking prey. Its large talons are feared as wicked weapons. Its well-developed chest muscles make it strong enough to whip up a gusty windstorm with just a few flaps. It spreads its beautiful wings wide to frighten its enemies. It can fly at Mach 2 speed. Its outstanding vision allows it to spot splashing MAGIKARP, even while flying at 3300 feet. This POKéMON has a dazzling plumage of beautifully glossy feathers. Many TRAINERS are captivated by the striking beauty of the feathers on its head, compelling them to choose PIDGEOT as their POKéMON. Its base stats are 83 HP, 80 Attack, 75 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 101 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 479. It has the abilities Keen Eye and Tangled Feet, with the hidden ability Big Pecks. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 39.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wing Attack (level 31), Feather Dance (level 34), Agility (level 44), Roost (level 44), Tailwind (level 50), Razor Wind (level 53). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Rattata
text: Rattata is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mouse Pokémon. Bites anything when it attacks. Small and very quick, it is a common sight in many places. Will chew on any­ thing with its fangs. If you see one, it is certain that 40 more live in the area. It eats anything. Wherever food is available, it will settle down and produce offspring continuously. Living wherever there is food available, it ceaselessly scav­ enges for edibles the entire day. This POKéMON's impressive vital­ ity allows it to live anywhere. It also multiplies very quickly. RATTATA is cautious in the extreme. Even while it is asleep, it constantly listens by moving its ears around. It is not picky about where it lives - it will make its nest anywhere. Its base stats are 30 HP, 56 Attack, 35 Defense, 25 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 72 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 253. It has the abilities Run Away and Guts, with the hidden ability Hustle. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 3.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Hyper Fang (level 14), Take Down (level 16), Sucker Punch (level 19), Crunch (level 22), Focus Energy (level 23), Assurance (level 25). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Raticate
text: Raticate is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mouse Pokémon. It evolves from Rattata. It uses its whis­ kers to maintain its balance. It apparently slows down if they are cut off. Its hind feet are webbed. They act as flippers, so it can swim in rivers and hunt for prey. Gnaws on anything with its tough fangs. It can even topple concrete buildings by gnaw­ ing on them. Its whiskers help it to maintain balance. Its fangs never stop grow­ ing, so it gnaws to pare them down. The webs on its hind legs enable it to cross rivers. It search­ es wide areas for food. RATICATE’s sturdy fangs grow steadily. To keep them ground down, it gnaws on rocks and logs. It may even chew on the walls of houses. Its base stats are 55 HP, 81 Attack, 60 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 97 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 413. It has the abilities Run Away and Guts, with the hidden ability Hustle. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 18.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Take Down (level 16), Sucker Punch (level 19), Scary Face (level 20), Crunch (level 24), Focus Energy (level 27), Assurance (level 29). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Spearow
text: Spearow is a Normal and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Tiny Bird Pokémon. It flaps its small wings busily to fly. Using its beak, it searches in grass for prey. Eats bugs in grassy areas. It has to flap its short wings at high speed to stay airborne. Inept at flying high. However, it can fly around very fast to protect its ter­ ritory. It flaps its short wings to flush out insects from tall grass. It then plucks them with its stubby beak. Very protective of its territory, it flaps its short wings busily to dart around at high speed. To protect its territory, it flies around ceaselessly, making high- pitched cries. Its base stats are 40 HP, 60 Attack, 30 Defense, 31 Special Attack, 31 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 262. It has the abilities Keen Eye, with the hidden ability Sniper. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 2.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wing Attack (level 18), Take Down (level 22), Mirror Move (level 22), Pursuit (level 25), Aerial Ace (level 25), Drill Peck (level 29). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Fearow
text: Fearow is a Normal and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Beak Pokémon. It evolves from Spearow. With its huge and magnificent wings, it can keep aloft without ever having to land for rest. A POKéMON that dates back many years. If it senses danger, it flies high and away, instantly. It shoots itself suddenly high into the sky, then plummets down in one fell swoop to strike its prey. It cleverly uses its thin, long beak to pluck and eat small insects that hide under the ground. It uses its long beak to attack. It has a surprisingly long reach, so it must be treated with caution. FEAROW is recognized by its long neck and elongated beak. They are conveniently shaped for catching prey in soil or water. It deftly moves its long and skinny beak to pluck prey. Its base stats are 65 HP, 90 Attack, 65 Defense, 61 Special Attack, 61 Special Defense, 100 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 442. It has the abilities Keen Eye, with the hidden ability Sniper. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 38.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wing Attack (level 18), Take Down (level 23), Mirror Move (level 25), Pursuit (level 26), Focus Energy (level 32), Drill Peck (level 34). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Ekans
text: Ekans is a Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Snake Pokémon. Moves silently and stealthily. Eats the eggs of birds, such as PIDGEY and SPEAROW, whole. The older it gets, the longer it grows. At night, it wraps its long body around tree branches to rest. It can freely de­ tach its jaw to swallow large prey whole. It can be­ come too heavy to move, however. It always hides in grass. When first born, it has no poison, so its bite is painful, but harmless. It flutters the tip of its tongue to seek out the scent of prey, then swallows the prey whole. EKANS curls itself up in a spiral while it rests. Assuming this position allows it to quickly respond to a threat from any direction with a glare from its upraised head. Its base stats are 35 HP, 60 Attack, 44 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 54 Special Defense, 55 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 288. It has the abilities Intimidate and Shed Skin, with the hidden ability Unnerve. It stands 2.0 meters tall and weighs 6.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Gastro Acid (level 33), Toxic (level 36), Stockpile (level 37), Spit Up (level 37), Swallow (level 37), Acid (level 38). It belongs to the Ground and Dragon egg groups.

title: Arbok
text: Arbok is a Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Cobra Pokémon. It evolves from Ekans. It is rumored that the ferocious warning markings on its belly differ from area to area. The frightening patterns on its belly have been studied. Six variations have been confirmed. Transfixing prey with the face-like pattern on its belly, it binds and poisons the frightened victim. With a very venge­ ful nature, it won't give up the chase, no matter how far, once it targets its prey. To intimidate foes, it spreads its chest wide and makes eerie sounds by expelling air from its mouth. This POKéMON is terrifically strong in order to constrict things with its body. It can even flatten steel oil drums. Once ARBOK wraps its body around its foe, escaping its crunching embrace is impossible. Its base stats are 60 HP, 95 Attack, 69 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 79 Special Defense, 80 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 448. It has the abilities Intimidate and Shed Skin, with the hidden ability Unnerve. It stands 3.5 meters tall and weighs 65.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Gastro Acid (level 42), Stockpile (level 46), Spit Up (level 46), Swallow (level 46), Acid (level 47), Belch (level 48). It belongs to the Ground and Dragon egg groups.

title: Pikachu
text: Pikachu is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mouse Pokémon. It evolves from Pichu. When several of these POKéMON gather, their electricity could build and cause lightning storms. It keeps its tail raised to monitor its surroundings. If you yank its tail, it will try to bite you. This intelligent POKéMON roasts hard BERRIES with electricity to make them tender enough to eat. It raises its tail to check its sur­ roundings. The tail is sometimes struck by light­ ning in this pose. When it is anger­ ed, it immediately discharges the energy stored in the pouches in its cheeks. Whenever PIKACHU comes across something new, it blasts it with a jolt of electricity. If you come across a blackened berry, it’s evidence that this POKéMON mistook the intensity of its charge. Its base stats are 35 HP, 55 Attack, 40 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 320. It has the abilities Static, with the hidden ability Lightning Rod. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 6.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Thunderbolt (level 26), Swift (level 26), Spark (level 26), Feint (level 29), Agility (level 33), Iron Tail (level 37). It belongs to the Ground and Fairy egg groups.

title: Raichu
text: Raichu is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mouse Pokémon. It evolves from Pikachu. Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high-voltage power. Its long tail serves as a ground to protect itself from its own high voltage power. When electricity builds up inside its body, it becomes feisty. It also glows in the dark. When its electric­ ity builds, its muscles are stimu­ lated, and it be­ comes more aggres­ sive than usual. If the electric pouches in its cheeks become fully charged, both ears will stand straight up. If its electric pouches run empty, it raises its tail to gather electri­ city from the atmosphere. Its base stats are 60 HP, 90 Attack, 55 Defense, 90 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 110 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 485. It has the abilities Static, with the hidden ability Lightning Rod. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 30.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Encore (level 1), Fake Out (level 1), Feint (level 1), Nasty Plot (level 1), Discharge (level 1), Electro Ball (level 1). It belongs to the Ground and Fairy egg groups.

title: Sandshrew
text: Sandshrew is a Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mouse Pokémon. Burrows deep underground in arid locations far from water. It only emerges to hunt for food. Its body is dry. When it gets cold at night, its hide is said to become coated with a fine dew. If it fell from a great height, this POKéMON could save itself by rolling into a ball and bouncing. Disliking water, it lives in deep burrows in arid areas. It can roll itself instantly into a ball. It prefers dry, sandy places because it uses the sand to protect itself when threatened. SANDSHREW’s body is configured to absorb water without waste, enabling it to survive in an arid desert. This POKéMON curls up to protect itself from its enemies. Its base stats are 50 HP, 75 Attack, 85 Defense, 20 Special Attack, 30 Special Defense, 40 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 300. It has the abilities Sand Veil, with the hidden ability Sand Rush. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 12.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Fury Cutter (level 25), Agility (level 27), Dig (level 30), Swift (level 31), Gyro Ball (level 33), Swords Dance (level 38). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Sandslash
text: Sandslash is a Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mouse Pokémon. It evolves from Sandshrew. Curls up into a spiny ball when threatened. It can roll while curled up to attack or escape. It is skilled at slashing enemies with its claws. If broken, they start to grow back in a day. In an attempt to hide itself, it will run around at top speed to kick up a blinding dust storm. If it digs at an incredible pace, it may snap off its spikes and claws. They grow back in a day. Adept at climbing trees, it rolls into a spiny ball, then attacks its enemies from above. SANDSLASH’s body is covered by tough spikes, which are hardened sections of its hide. Once a year, the old spikes fall out, to be replaced with new spikes that grow out from beneath the old ones. Its base stats are 75 HP, 100 Attack, 110 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 450. It has the abilities Sand Veil, with the hidden ability Sand Rush. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 29.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Protect (level 28), Fury Cutter (level 28), Dig (level 30), Swift (level 36), Swords Dance (level 38), Gyro Ball (level 45). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Nidoran f
text: Nidoran f is a Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Poison Pin Pokémon. Although small, its venomous barbs render this POKéMON dangerous. The female has smaller horns. A mild-mannered POKéMON that does not like to fight. Beware, its small horns secrete venom. The poison hidden in its small horn is extremely po­ tent. Even a tiny scratch can have fatal results. Although not very combative, it will torment its foes with poison spikes if it is threat­ ened in any way. Small and very docile, it pro­ tects itself with its small, poison­ ous horn when attacked. NIDORAN has barbs that secrete a powerful poison. They are thought to have developed as protection for this small-bodied POKéMON. When enraged, it releases a horrible toxin from its horn. Its base stats are 55 HP, 47 Attack, 52 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 41 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 275. It has the abilities Poison Point and Rivalry, with the hidden ability Hustle. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 7.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Super Fang (level 27), Bite (level 29), Toxic Spikes (level 31), Fury Swipes (level 36), Flatter (level 38), Double Kick (level 43). It belongs to the Monster and Ground egg groups.

title: Nidorina
text: Nidorina is a Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Poison Pin Pokémon. It evolves from Nidoran-f. The female's horn develops slowly. Prefers physical attacks such as clawing and biting. When resting deep in its burrow, its thorns always retract. This is proof that it is relaxed. When feeding its young, it first chews and tender­ izes the food, then spits it out for the offspring. It has a calm and caring nature. Because its horn grows slowly, it prefers not to fight. It has a docile nature. If it is threatened with attack, it raises the barbs that are all over its body. When NIDORINA are with their friends or family, they keep their barbs tucked away to prevent hurting each other. This POKéMON appears to become nervous if separated from the others. Its base stats are 70 HP, 62 Attack, 67 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 56 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 365. It has the abilities Poison Point and Rivalry, with the hidden ability Hustle. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 20.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 32), Toxic Spikes (level 35), Fury Swipes (level 41), Flatter (level 43), Super Fang (level 47), Double Kick (level 50). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Nidoqueen
text: Nidoqueen is a Poison and Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Drill Pokémon. It evolves from Nidorina. Its hard scales provide strong protection. It uses its hefty bulk to execute powerful moves. Tough scales cover the sturdy body of this POKéMON. It appears that the scales grow in cycles. Its body is cover­ ed with needle- like scales. It never shows signs of shrinking from any attack. It uses its scaly, rugged body to seal the entrance of its nest and protect its young from predators. The hard scales that cover its strong body serve as excellent protection from any attack. NIDOQUEEN’s body is encased in extremely hard scales. It is adept at sending foes flying with harsh tackles. This POKéMON is at its strongest when it is defending its young. Its base stats are 90 HP, 92 Attack, 87 Defense, 75 Special Attack, 85 Special Defense, 76 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505. It has the abilities Poison Point and Rivalry, with the hidden ability Sheer Force. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 60.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Crunch (level 1), Flatter (level 1), Helping Hand (level 1), Toxic Spikes (level 1), Sludge Wave (level 1), Double Kick (level 12). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Nidoran m
text: Nidoran m is a Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Poison Pin Pokémon. Stiffens its ears to sense danger. The larger its horns, the more powerful its secreted venom. Its large ears are always kept upright. If it senses danger, it will attack with a poisonous sting. It is small, but its horn is filled with poison. It charges then stabs with the horn to inject poison. It raises its big ears to check its surroundings. It will strike first if it senses any danger. It constantly moves its large ears in many directions in order to detect danger right away. The male NIDORAN has developed muscles for moving its ears. Thanks to them, the ears can be freely moved in any direction. Even the slightest sound does not escape this POKéMON’s notice. Its base stats are 46 HP, 57 Attack, 40 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 273. It has the abilities Poison Point and Rivalry, with the hidden ability Hustle. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 9.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Focus Energy (level 21), Helping Hand (level 23), Fury Attack (level 29), Toxic Spikes (level 31), Horn Drill (level 36), Poison Jab (level 37). It belongs to the Monster and Ground egg groups.

title: Nidorino
text: Nidorino is a Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Poison Pin Pokémon. It evolves from Nidoran-m. An aggressive POKéMON that is quick to attack. The horn on its head secretes a powerful venom. Its horns contain venom. If they are stabbed into an enemy, the impact makes the poison leak out. It raises its big ears to check its surroundings. If it senses any­ thing, it attacks immediately. Quick to anger, it stabs enemies with its horn to inject a powerful poison when it becomes agitated. It is easily agitated and uses its horn for offense as soon as it notices an attacker. NIDORINO has a horn that is harder than a diamond. If it senses a hostile presence, all the barbs on its back bristle up at once, and it challenges the foe with all its might. Its base stats are 61 HP, 72 Attack, 57 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 365. It has the abilities Poison Point and Rivalry, with the hidden ability Hustle. It stands 0.9 meters tall and weighs 19.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Focus Energy (level 23), Helping Hand (level 26), Fury Attack (level 32), Toxic Spikes (level 35), Horn Drill (level 41), Flatter (level 43). It belongs to the Monster and Ground egg groups.

title: Nidoking
text: Nidoking is a Poison and Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Drill Pokémon. It evolves from Nidorino. It uses its powerful tail in battle to smash, constrict, then break the prey's bones. Its steel-like hide adds to its powerful tackle. Its horns are so hard, they can pierce a diamond. It swings its big tail around during battle. If its foe flinches, it will charge with its sturdy body. Its tail is thick and powerful. If it binds an enemy, it can snap the victim's spine quite easily. It uses its thick arms, legs and tail to attack forcefully. Melee combat is its specialty. NIDOKING’s thick tail packs enormously destructive power. With one swing, it can topple a metal transmission tower. Once this POKéMON goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it. Its base stats are 81 HP, 102 Attack, 77 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505. It has the abilities Poison Point and Rivalry, with the hidden ability Sheer Force. It stands 1.4 meters tall and weighs 62.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Focus Energy (level 1), Flatter (level 1), Helping Hand (level 1), Toxic Spikes (level 1), Poison Jab (level 1), Sludge Wave (level 1). It belongs to the Monster and Ground egg groups.

title: Clefairy
text: Clefairy is a Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Fairy Pokémon. It evolves from Cleffa. Its magical and cute appeal has many admirers. It is rare and found only in certain areas. Adored for their cute looks and playfulness. They are thought to be rare, as they do not appear often. The moonlight that it stores in the wings on its back apparently gives it the ability to float in midair. Its adorable be­ havior and cry make it highly popular. However, this cute POKéMON is rarely found. Though rarely seen, it becomes easier to spot, for some reason, on the night of a  full moon. On every night of a full moon, groups of this POKéMON come out to play. When dawn arrives, the tired CLEFAIRY return to their quiet mountain retreats and go to sleep nestled up against each other. Its base stats are 70 HP, 45 Attack, 48 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 35 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 323. It has the abilities Cute Charm and Magic Guard, with the hidden ability Friend Guard. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 7.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Defense Curl (level 39), Body Slam (level 40), Moonlight (level 43), Stored Power (level 43), Meteor Mash (level 45), Healing Wish (level 46). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Clefable
text: Clefable is a Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Fairy Pokémon. It evolves from Clefairy. A timid fairy POKéMON that is rarely seen. It will run and hide the moment it senses people. They appear to be very protective of their own world. It is a kind of fairy, rarely seen by people. With its acute hearing, it can pick up sounds from far away. It usually hides in quiet places. Its very sensitive ears lets it dis­ tinguish distant sounds. As a re­ sult, it prefers quiet places. Said to live in quiet, remote mountains, this type of fairy has a strong aversion to being seen. CLEFABLE moves by skipping lightly as if it were flying using its wings. Its bouncy step lets it even walk on water. It is known to take strolls on lakes on quiet, moonlit nights. Its base stats are 95 HP, 70 Attack, 73 Defense, 95 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 483. It has the abilities Cute Charm and Magic Guard, with the hidden ability Unaware. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 40.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Disarming Voice (level 1), Moonblast (level 1), Spotlight (level 1), Life Dew (level 1), Fairy Wind (level 5), Baby Doll Eyes (level 9). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Vulpix
text: Vulpix is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Fox Pokémon. At the time of birth, it has just one tail. The tail splits from its tip as it grows older. Both its fur and its tails are beautiful. As it grows, the tails split and form more tails. As it develops,  its single white tail gains color and splits into six. It is quite warm and cuddly. If it is attacked by an enemy that is stronger than itself, it feigns injury to fool the enemy and escapes. As its body grows larger, its six warm tails become more beautiful, with a more luxur­ ious coat of fur. At the time of its birth, VULPIX has one white tail. The tail separates into six if this POKéMON receives plenty of love from its TRAINER. The six tails become magnificently curled. Its base stats are 38 HP, 41 Attack, 40 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 299. It has the abilities Flash Fire, with the hidden ability Drought. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 9.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Confuse Ray (level 28), Hex (level 28), Payback (level 31), Flamethrower (level 35), Grudge (level 37), Captivate (level 37). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Ninetales
text: Ninetales is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Fox Pokémon. It evolves from Vulpix. Very smart and very vengeful. Grabbing one of its many tails could result in a 1000-year curse. According to an enduring legend, 9 noble saints were united and reincarnated as this POKéMON. Some legends claim that each of its nine tails has its own unique type of special mystical power. Its nine beautiful tails are filled with a wondrous energy that could keep it alive for 1,000 years. It is said to live a thousand years, and each of its tails is loaded with supernatural powers. NINETALES casts a sinister light from its bright red eyes to gain total control over its foe’s mind. This POKéMON is said to live for a thousand years. Its base stats are 73 HP, 76 Attack, 75 Defense, 81 Special Attack, 100 Special Defense, 100 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505. It has the abilities Flash Fire, with the hidden ability Drought. It stands 1.1 meters tall and weighs 19.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Will O Wisp (level 1), Imprison (level 1), Grudge (level 1), Extrasensory (level 1), Nasty Plot (level 1), Incinerate (level 1). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Jigglypuff
text: Jigglypuff is a Normal and Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Balloon Pokémon. It evolves from Igglybuff. When its huge eyes light up, it sings a mysteriously soothing melody that lulls its enemies to sleep. Uses its alluring eyes to enrapture its foe. It then sings a pleasing melody that lulls the foe to sleep. If it inflates to SING a lullaby, it can perform longer and cause sure drowsiness in its audience. Looking into its cute, round eyes causes it to sing a relaxing melody, inducing its enemies to sleep. It rolls its cute eyes as it sings a soothing lullaby. Its gentle song puts anyone who hears it to sleep. JIGGLYPUFF’s vocal chords can freely adjust the wavelength of its voice. This POKéMON uses this ability to sing at precisely the right wavelength to make its foes most drowsy. Its base stats are 115 HP, 45 Attack, 20 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 25 Special Defense, 20 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 270. It has the abilities Cute Charm and Competitive, with the hidden ability Friend Guard. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 5.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Swallow (level 25), Rest (level 29), Gyro Ball (level 33), Body Slam (level 34), Wake Up Slap (level 37), Double Edge (level 39). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Wigglytuff
text: Wigglytuff is a Normal and Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Balloon Pokémon. It evolves from Jigglypuff. The body is soft and rubbery. When angered, it will suck in air and inflate itself to an enormous size. Its body is full of elasticity. By inhaling deeply, it can continue to inflate itself without limit. Their fur feels so good that if two of them snuggle together, they won't want to be separated. It has a very fine fur. Take care not to make it angry, or it may inflate steadily and hit with a BODY SLAM. The rich, fluffy fur that covers its body feels so good that anyone who feels it can't stop touching it. WIGGLYTUFF has large, saucerlike eyes. The surfaces of its eyes are always covered with a thin layer of tears. If any dust gets in this POKéMON’s eyes, it is quickly washed away. Its base stats are 140 HP, 70 Attack, 45 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 435. It has the abilities Cute Charm and Competitive, with the hidden ability Frisk. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 12.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Spit Up (level 1), Swallow (level 1), Hyper Voice (level 1), Covet (level 1), Gyro Ball (level 1), Copycat (level 1). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Zubat
text: Zubat is a Poison and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Bat Pokémon. Forms colonies in perpetually dark places. Uses ultrasonic waves to identify and approach targets. Emits ultrasonic cries while it flies. They act as a sonar used to check for ob­ jects in its way. While flying, it constantly emits ultrasonic waves from its mouth to check its sur­ roundings. Capable of flying safely in dark places, it emits ultrasonic cries to check for any obstacles. During the day, it gathers with others and hangs from the ceilings of old buildings and caves. ZUBAT remains quietly unmoving in a dark spot during the bright daylight hours. It does so because prolonged exposure to the sun causes its body to become slightly burned. Its base stats are 40 HP, 45 Attack, 35 Defense, 30 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 55 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 245. It has the abilities Inner Focus, with the hidden ability Infiltrator. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 7.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wing Attack (level 28), Toxic (level 28), Air Cutter (level 31), Acrobatics (level 33), Haze (level 36), Mean Look (level 36). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Golbat
text: Golbat is a Poison and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Bat Pokémon. It evolves from Zubat. Once it strikes, it will not stop draining energy from the victim even if it gets too heavy to fly. It attacks in a stealthy manner, without warning. Its sharp fangs are used to bite and suck blood. However hard its victim's hide may be, it punctures with sharp fangs and gorges itself with blood. It can drink more than 10 ounces of blood at once. If it has too much, it gets heavy and flies clumsily. When it plunges its fangs into its prey, it instantly draws and gulps down more than ten ounces of blood. GOLBAT loves to drink the blood of living things. It is particularly active in the pitch black of night. This POKéMON flits around in the night skies, seeking fresh blood. Its base stats are 75 HP, 80 Attack, 70 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 455. It has the abilities Inner Focus, with the hidden ability Infiltrator. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 55.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wing Attack (level 32), Air Cutter (level 35), Acrobatics (level 39), Toxic (level 40), Mean Look (level 42), Haze (level 43). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Oddish
text: Oddish is a Grass and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Weed Pokémon. During the day, it keeps its face buried in the ground. At night, it wanders around sowing its seeds. It may be mistaken for a clump of weeds. If you try to yank it out of the ground, it shrieks horribly. Awakened by moon­ light, it roams  actively at night. In the day, it stays quietly underground. If exposed to moonlight, it starts to move. It roams far and wide at night to scatter its seeds. During the day, it stays in the cold underground to avoid the sun. It grows by bath­ ing in moonlight. During the daytime, ODDISH buries itself in soil to absorb nutrients from  the ground using its entire body. The more fertile the soil, the glossier its leaves become. Its base stats are 45 HP, 50 Attack, 55 Defense, 75 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 320. It has the abilities Chlorophyll, with the hidden ability Run Away. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 5.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Acid (level 24), Lucky Chant (level 25), Natural Gift (level 29), Moonlight (level 32), Petal Dance (level 33), Toxic (level 35). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Gloom
text: Gloom is a Grass and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Weed Pokémon. It evolves from Oddish. The fluid that oozes from its mouth isn't drool. It is a nectar that is used to attract prey. Smells incredibly foul! However, around 1 out of 1,000 people enjoy sniffing its nose- bending stink. What appears to be drool is actually sweet honey. It is very sticky and clings stubbornly if touched. It secretes a sticky, drool-like honey. Although sweet, it smells too repulsive to get very close. The smell from its drool-like syrup and the pollen on its petals is so bad, it may make opponents faint. GLOOM releases a foul fragrance from the pistil of its flower. When faced with danger, the stench worsens. If this POKéMON is feeling calm and secure, it does not release its usual stinky aroma. Its base stats are 60 HP, 65 Attack, 70 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 40 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 395. It has the abilities Chlorophyll, with the hidden ability Stench. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 8.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Lucky Chant (level 29), Moonlight (level 35), Natural Gift (level 35), Petal Dance (level 38), Toxic (level 39), Moonblast (level 45). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Vileplume
text: Vileplume is a Grass and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Flower Pokémon. It evolves from Gloom. It has the world’s largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen. The larger its petals, the more toxic pollen it contains. Its big head is heavy and hard to hold up. Flaps its broad flower petals to scatter its poisonous pollen. The flapping sound is very loud. It has the world's largest petals. With every step, the petals shake out heavy clouds of toxic pollen. The bud bursts into bloom with a bang. It then starts scattering allergenic, poi­ sonous pollen. By shaking its big petals, it scat­ ters toxic pollen into the air, turning the air yellow. Its base stats are 75 HP, 80 Attack, 85 Defense, 110 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 490. It has the abilities Chlorophyll, with the hidden ability Effect Spore. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 18.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Toxic (level 1), Giga Drain (level 1), Sweet Scent (level 1), Moonlight (level 1), Aromatherapy (level 1), Grassy Terrain (level 1). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Paras
text: Paras is a Bug and Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mushroom Pokémon. Burrows to suck tree roots. The mushrooms on its back grow by draw­ ing nutrients from the bug host. Burrows under the ground to gnaw on tree roots. The mushrooms on its back absorb most of the nutrition. It is doused with mushroom spores when it is born. As its body grows, mushrooms sprout from its back. As its body grows large, oriental mushrooms named tochukaso start sprouting out of its back. The tochukaso growing on this POKéMON's back orders it to extract juice from tree trunks. PARAS has parasitic mushrooms growing on its back called tochukaso. They grow large by drawing nutrients from the BUG POKéMON host. They are highly valued as a medicine for extending life. Its base stats are 35 HP, 70 Attack, 55 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 25 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 285. It has the abilities Effect Spore and Dry Skin, with the hidden ability Damp. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 5.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Fury Cutter (level 17), Leech Life (level 20), Spore (level 27), Slash (level 34), Growth (level 41), Giga Drain (level 43). It belongs to the Bug and Plant egg groups.

title: Parasect
text: Parasect is a Bug and Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mushroom Pokémon. It evolves from Paras. A host-parasite pair in which the parasite mushroom has taken over the host bug. Prefers damp places. The bug host is drained of energy by the mushrooms on its back. They appear to do all the thinking. It stays mostly in dark, damp places, the preference not of the bug, but of the big mush­ rooms on its back. The larger the mushroom on its back grows, the stronger the mush­ room spores it scatters. When nothing's left to extract from the bug, the mushrooms on its back leave spores on the bug's egg. PARASECT is known to infest large trees en masse and drain nutrients from the lower trunk and roots. When an infested tree dies, they move onto another tree all at once. Its base stats are 60 HP, 95 Attack, 80 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 405. It has the abilities Effect Spore and Dry Skin, with the hidden ability Damp. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 29.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Venoshock (level 15), Fury Cutter (level 17), Spore (level 30), Slash (level 39), Energy Ball (level 47), Growth (level 48). It belongs to the Bug and Plant egg groups.

title: Venonat
text: Venonat is a Bug and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Insect Pokémon. Lives in the shadows of tall trees where it eats insects. It is attracted by light at night. Its large eyes act as radars. In a bright place, you can see that they are clusters of many tiny eyes. Its eyes also function as radar units. It catches and eats small bugs that hide in darkness. Poison oozes from all over its body. It catches and eats small bugs at night that are at­ tracted by light. The small bugs it eats appear only at night, so it sleeps in a hole in a tree until night falls. VENONAT is said to have evolved with a coat of thin, stiff hair that covers its entire body for protection. It possesses large eyes that never fail to spot even miniscule prey. Its base stats are 60 HP, 55 Attack, 50 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 305. It has the abilities Compound Eyes and Tinted Lens, with the hidden ability Run Away. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 30.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Mega Drain (level 25), Bug Buzz (level 25), Leech Life (level 27), Stun Spore (level 30), Psybeam (level 35), Signal Beam (level 35). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Venomoth
text: Venomoth is a Bug and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Poison Moth Pokémon. It evolves from Venonat. The dustlike scales covering its wings are color-coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has. The dust-like scales covering its wings are color coded to indicate the kinds of poison it has. The powdery scales on its wings are hard to remove. They also contain poison that leaks out on contact. When it attacks, it flaps its large wings violently to scatter its poi­ sonous powder all around. The powder on its wings is poisonous if it is dark in color. If it is light, it causes paralysis. The scales it scatters will paralyze anyone who touches them, making that person unable to stand. Its base stats are 70 HP, 65 Attack, 60 Defense, 90 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 450. It has the abilities Shield Dust and Tinted Lens, with the hidden ability Wonder Skin. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 12.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Stun Spore (level 30), Gust (level 31), Signal Beam (level 37), Psybeam (level 38), Zen Headbutt (level 41), Sleep Powder (level 43). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Diglett
text: Diglett is a Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mole Pokémon. Lives about one yard underground where it feeds on plant roots. It sometimes appears above ground. It prefers dark places. It spends most of its time underground, though it may pop up in caves. Its skin is very thin. If it is exposed to light, its blood heats up, causing it to grow weak. If a DIGLETT DIGS through a field, it leaves the soil perfectly tilled and ideal for planting crops. It digs under­ ground and chews on tree roots, sticking its head out only when the sun isn't bright. DIGLETT are raised in most farms. The reason is simple - wherever this POKéMON burrows, the soil is left perfectly tilled for planting crops. This soil is made ideal for growing delicious vegetables. Its base stats are 10 HP, 55 Attack, 25 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 95 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 265. It has the abilities Sand Veil and Arena Trap, with the hidden ability Sand Force. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 0.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Fury Swipes (level 21), Sucker Punch (level 23), Sand Attack (level 24), Mud Slap (level 25), Earth Power (level 26), Sandstorm (level 28). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Dugtrio
text: Dugtrio is a Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Mole Pokémon. It evolves from Diglett. A team of DIGLETT triplets. It triggers huge earthquakes by burrowing 60 miles underground. A team of triplets that can burrow over 60 MPH. Due to this, some people think it's an earthquake. Its three heads bob separately up and down to loosen the soil nearby, making it easier for it to burrow. Extremely power­ ful, they can DIG through even the hardest ground to a depth of over 60 miles. These DIGLETT triplets dig over 60 miles below sea level. No one knows what it's like underground. DUGTRIO are actually triplets that emerged from one body. As a result, each triplet thinks exactly like the other two triplets. They work cooperatively to burrow endlessly. Its base stats are 35 HP, 100 Attack, 50 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 120 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 425. It has the abilities Sand Veil and Arena Trap, with the hidden ability Sand Force. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 33.3 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sucker Punch (level 23), Sand Attack (level 24), Mud Slap (level 25), Sand Tomb (level 26), Earth Power (level 28), Sandstorm (level 30). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Meowth
text: Meowth is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Scratch Cat Pokémon. It washes its face regularly to keep the coin on its forehead spotless. It doesn’t get along with Galarian Meowth. Adores circular objects. Wanders the streets on a nightly basis to look for dropped loose change. Appears to be more active at night. It loves round and shiny things. It can't stop from picking them up. It is fascinated by round objects. It can't stop playing with them until it tires and falls asleep. It loves anything that shines. It especially adores coins that it picks up and se­ cretly hoards. It loves things that sparkle. When it sees a shiny object, the gold coin on its head shines too. Its base stats are 40 HP, 45 Attack, 35 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 290. It has the abilities Pickup and Technician, with the hidden ability Unnerve. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 4.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Fury Swipes (level 33), Play Rough (level 35), Nasty Plot (level 38), Assurance (level 41), Slash (level 44), Swagger (level 45). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Persian
text: Persian is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Classy Cat Pokémon. It evolves from Meowth. Although its fur has many admirers, it is tough to raise as a pet because of its fickle meanness. The gem in its forehead glows on its own! It walks with all the grace and elegance of a proud queen. Many adore it for its sophisticated air. However, it will lash out and scratch for little reason. Its lithe muscles allow it to walk without making a sound. It attacks in an instant. Behind its lithe, elegant appearance lies a barbaric side. It will tear apart its prey on a mere whim. PERSIAN has six bold whiskers that give it a look of toughness. The whiskers   sense air movements to determine what is in the POKéMON’s surrounding vicinity. It becomes docile if grabbed by the whiskers. Its base stats are 65 HP, 70 Attack, 60 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 115 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 440. It has the abilities Limber and Technician, with the hidden ability Unnerve. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 32.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Power Gem (level 32), Fury Swipes (level 37), Nasty Plot (level 44), Assurance (level 49), Slash (level 51), Captivate (level 56). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Psyduck
text: Psyduck is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Duck Pokémon. While lulling its enemies with its vacant look, this wily POKéMON will use psychokinetic powers. Always tormented by headaches. It uses psychic powers, but it is not known if it intends to do so. It has mystical powers but doesn't recall that it has used them. That is why it always looks puzzled. If its chronic headache peaks, it may exhibit odd powers. It seems unable to recall such an episode. The only time it can use its psy­ chic power is when its sleeping brain cells happen to wake. PSYDUCK uses a mysterious power. When it does so, this POKéMON  generates brain waves that are supposedly only seen in sleepers. This discovery spurred controversy among scholars. Its base stats are 50 HP, 52 Attack, 48 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 55 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 320. It has the abilities Damp and Cloud Nine, with the hidden ability Swift Swim. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 19.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Psych Up (level 31), Aqua Tail (level 32), Soak (level 35), Surf (level 36), Confusion (level 36), Zen Headbutt (level 40). It belongs to the Water1 and Ground egg groups.

title: Golduck
text: Golduck is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Duck Pokémon. It evolves from Psyduck. Often seen swim­ ming elegantly by lake shores. It is often mistaken for the Japanese monster, Kappa. Its slim and long limbs end in broad flippers. They are used for swim­ ming gracefully in lakes. When it swims at full speed using its long, webbed limbs, its fore­ head somehow be­ gins to glow. It appears by waterways at dusk. It may use tele­ kinetic powers if its forehead glows mysteriously. It swims grace­ fully along on the quiet, slow-moving rivers and lakes of which it is so fond. The webbed flippers on its forelegs and hind legs and the streamlined body of GOLDUCK give it frightening speed. This POKéMON is definitely much faster than even the most athletic swimmer. Its base stats are 80 HP, 82 Attack, 78 Defense, 95 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 500. It has the abilities Damp and Cloud Nine, with the hidden ability Swift Swim. It stands 1.7 meters tall and weighs 76.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Psych Up (level 31), Aqua Tail (level 32), Soak (level 37), Confusion (level 39), Surf (level 42), Zen Headbutt (level 44). It belongs to the Water1 and Ground egg groups.

title: Mankey
text: Mankey is a Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Pig Monkey Pokémon. Extremely quick to anger. It could be docile one moment then thrashing away the next instant. An agile POKéMON that lives in trees. It angers easily and will not hesitate to attack anything. It is extremely ill-tempered. Groups of them will attack any handy target for no reason. It's unsafe to ap­ proach if it gets violently enraged for no reason and can't distinguish friends from foes. It lives in groups in the treetops. If it loses sight of its group, it becomes infuriated by its loneliness. When MANKEY starts shaking and its nasal breathing turns rough, it’s a sure sign that it is becoming angry. However, because it goes into a towering rage almost instantly, it is impossible for anyone to flee its wrath. Its base stats are 40 HP, 80 Attack, 35 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 305. It has the abilities Vital Spirit and Anger Point, with the hidden ability Defiant. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 28.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Seismic Toss (level 33), Swagger (level 36), Thrash (level 39), Cross Chop (level 39), Stomping Tantrum (level 43), Screech (level 45). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Primeape
text: Primeape is a Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Pig Monkey Pokémon. It evolves from Mankey. Always furious and tenacious to boot. It will not abandon chasing its quarry until it is caught. It stops being angry only when nobody else is around. To view this moment is very difficult. If approached while asleep, it may awaken and angrily give chase in a groggy state of semi-sleep. It becomes wildly furious if it even senses someone looking at it. It chases anyone that meets its glare. It will beat up anyone who makes it mad, even if it has to chase them until the end of the world. When PRIMEAPE becomes furious, its blood circulation is boosted. In turn, its muscles are made even stronger. However, it also becomes much less intelligent at the same time. Its base stats are 65 HP, 105 Attack, 60 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 95 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 455. It has the abilities Vital Spirit and Anger Point, with the hidden ability Defiant. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 32.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Seismic Toss (level 37), Swagger (level 44), Screech (level 45), Cross Chop (level 45), Thrash (level 46), Stomping Tantrum (level 48). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Growlithe
text: Growlithe is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Puppy Pokémon. Very protective of its territory. It will bark and bite to repel intruders from its space. A POKéMON with a friendly nature. However, it will bark fiercely at anything invading its territory. It has a brave and trustworthy na­ ture. It fear­ lessly stands up to bigger and stronger foes. Extremely loyal, it will fearlessly bark at any oppo­ nent to protect its own trainer from harm. It controls a big territory. If it detects an unknown smell, it roars loudly to force out the intruder. GROWLITHE has a superb sense of smell. Once it smells anything, this POKéMON won’t forget the scent, no matter what. It uses its advanced olfactory sense to determine the emotions of other living things. Its base stats are 55 HP, 70 Attack, 45 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 350. It has the abilities Intimidate and Flash Fire, with the hidden ability Justified. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 19.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Flame Wheel (level 34), Play Rough (level 35), Helping Hand (level 37), Agility (level 39), Crunch (level 42), Outrage (level 43). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Arcanine
text: Arcanine is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Legendary Pokémon. It evolves from Growlithe. A POKéMON that has been admired since the past for its beauty. It runs agilely as if on wings. A legendary POKé­ MON in China. Many people are charmed by its grace and beauty while running. This legendary Chinese POKEMON is considered magnif­ icent. Many people are enchanted by its grand mane. Its magnificent bark conveys a sense of majesty. Anyone hearing it can't help but grovel before it. An ancient picture scroll shows that people were attracted to its movement as it ran through prairies. ARCANINE is known for its high speed. It is said to be capable of running over 6,200 miles in a single day and night. The fire that blazes wildly within this POKéMON’s body is its source of power. Its base stats are 90 HP, 110 Attack, 80 Defense, 100 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 95 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 555. It has the abilities Intimidate and Flash Fire, with the hidden ability Justified. It stands 1.9 meters tall and weighs 155.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Helping Hand (level 1), Odor Sleuth (level 1), Howl (level 1), Flare Blitz (level 1), Thunder Fang (level 1), Fire Fang (level 1). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Poliwag
text: Poliwag is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Tadpole Pokémon. Its newly grown legs prevent it from running. It appears to prefer swimming than trying to stand. The direction of the spiral on the belly differs by area. It is more adept at swimming than walking. Because it is in­ ept at walking on its newly grown legs, it always  swims around in water. The direction of its belly spiral differs by area. The equator is thought to have an effect on this. The swirl on its belly is its insides showing through the skin. It looks clearer after it eats. POLIWAG has a very thin skin. It is possible to see the POKéMON’s spiral innards right through the skin. Despite its thinness, however, the skin is also very flexible. Even sharp fangs bounce right off it. Its base stats are 40 HP, 50 Attack, 40 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 300. It has the abilities Water Absorb and Damp, with the hidden ability Swift Swim. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 12.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Low Kick (level 26), Mud Shot (level 28), Body Slam (level 31), Wake Up Slap (level 35), Earth Power (level 36), Belly Drum (level 37). It belongs to the Water1 egg groups.

title: Poliwhirl
text: Poliwhirl is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Tadpole Pokémon. It evolves from Poliwag. Capable of living in or out of water. When out of water, it sweats to keep its body slimy. Under attack, it uses its belly  spiral to put the foe to sleep. It then makes its escape. The swirl on its belly subtly un­ dulates. Staring at it may gradual­ ly cause drowsi­ ness. The skin on most of its body is moist. However, the skin on its belly spiral feels smooth. Though it is skilled at walk­ ing, it prefers to live underwater where there is less danger. The surface of POLIWHIRL’s body is always wet and slick with an oily fluid. Because of this greasy covering, it can easily slip and slide out of the clutches of any enemy in battle. Its base stats are 65 HP, 65 Attack, 65 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 385. It has the abilities Water Absorb and Damp, with the hidden ability Swift Swim. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 20.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Low Kick (level 30), Mud Shot (level 32), Body Slam (level 33), Earth Power (level 40), Amnesia (level 41), Belly Drum (level 43). It belongs to the Water1 egg groups.

title: Poliwrath
text: Poliwrath is a Water and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Tadpole Pokémon. It evolves from Poliwhirl. An adept swimmer at both the front crawl and breast stroke. Easily overtakes the best human swimmers. Swims powerfully using all the muscles in its body. It can even overtake champion swimmers. This strong and skilled swimmer is even capable of crossing the Pacific Ocean just by kicking. Although an ener­ getic, skilled swimmer that uses all of its mus­ cles, it lives on dry land. It can use its well-developed arms and legs to run on the surface of the water for a split second. POLIWRATH’s highly developed, brawny muscles never grow fatigued, however much it exercises. It is so tirelessly strong, this POKéMON can swim back and forth across the Pacific Ocean without effort. Its base stats are 90 HP, 95 Attack, 95 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Water Absorb and Damp, with the hidden ability Swift Swim. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 54.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bubble (level 1), Belly Drum (level 1), Rain Dance (level 1), Bulk Up (level 1), Mud Shot (level 1), Earth Power (level 1). It belongs to the Water1 egg groups.

title: Abra
text: Abra is a Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Psi Pokémon. Using its ability to read minds, it will identify impending danger and TELEPORT to safety. Sleeps 18 hours a day. If it senses danger, it will teleport itself to safety even as it sleeps. It senses impend­ ing attacks and TELEPORTS away to safety before the actual attacks can strike. If it decides to TELEPORT randomly, it creates the illusion that it has created copies of itself. It hypnotizes itself so that it can teleport away when it senses danger, even if it is asleep. ABRA sleeps for eighteen hours a day. However, it can sense the presence of foes even while it is sleeping. In such a situation, this POKéMON immediately teleports to safety. Its base stats are 25 HP, 20 Attack, 15 Defense, 105 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 310. It has the abilities Synchronize and Inner Focus, with the hidden ability Magic Guard. It stands 0.9 meters tall and weighs 19.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Teleport (level 1). It belongs to the Humanshape egg groups.

title: Kadabra
text: Kadabra is a Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 1. It is known as the Psi Pokémon. It evolves from Abra. It emits special alpha waves from its body that induce headaches just by being close by. Many odd things happen if this POKéMON is close by. For example, it makes clocks run backwards.
