Known as the Beast That Calls the Moon, this Pokémon lives by taking in any and all light and converting it into its own energy. It steals the light from its surroundings and then becomes the full moon, showering its own light across the night sky. Its base stats are 137 HP, 113 Attack, 89 Defense, 137 Special Attack, 107 Special Defense, 97 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 680. It has the abilities Shadow Shield. It stands 4.0 meters tall and weighs 120.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Shadow Ball (level 23), Moonlight (level 31), Night Daze (level 37), Magic Coat (level 43), Moonblast (level 47), Psychic (level 49). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Nihilego
text: Nihilego is a Rock and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Parasite Pokémon. One of several mysterious Ultra Beasts. People on the street report observing those infested by it suddenly becoming violent. One of the Ultra Beasts. It’s unclear whether or not this Pokémon is sentient, but sometimes it can be observed behaving like a young girl. A life-form from another world, it was dubbed a UB and is thought to produce a strong neurotoxin. It appeared in this world from an Ultra Wormhole. Nihilego appears to be a parasite that lives by feeding on people and Pokémon. Its base stats are 109 HP, 53 Attack, 47 Defense, 127 Special Attack, 131 Special Defense, 103 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 55.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Venoshock (level 23), Toxic Spikes (level 29), Safeguard (level 31), Power Gem (level 37), Mirror Coat (level 43), Acid Spray (level 47). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Buzzwole
text: Buzzwole is a Bug and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Swollen Pokémon. This Ultra Beast appeared from another world. It shows off its body, but whether that display is a boast or a threat remains unclear. A mysterious life-form called an Ultra Beast. Witnesses saw it pulverize a dump truck with a single punch. Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives. Buzzwole goes around showing off its abnormally swollen muscles. It is one kind of Ultra Beast. Its base stats are 107 HP, 139 Attack, 139 Defense, 53 Special Attack, 53 Special Defense, 79 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 2.4 meters tall and weighs 333.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Endure (level 23), Leech Life (level 29), Taunt (level 31), Mega Punch (level 37), Counter (level 43), Hammer Arm (level 47). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Pheromosa
text: Pheromosa is a Bug and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Lissome Pokémon. One of the dangerous Ultra Beasts, it has been spotted running across the land at terrific speeds. One of the Ultra Beasts. It refuses to touch anything, perhaps because it senses some uncleanness in this world. A life-form that lives in another world, its body is thin and supple, but it also possesses great power. Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives. Its base stats are 71 HP, 137 Attack, 37 Defense, 137 Special Attack, 37 Special Defense, 151 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 25.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Silver Wind (level 23), Bounce (level 29), Jump Kick (level 31), Agility (level 37), Triple Kick (level 43), Lunge (level 47). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Xurkitree
text: Xurkitree is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Glowing Pokémon. One of the mysterious life-forms known as Ultra Beasts. Astonishing electric shocks emanate from its entire body, according to witnesses. It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. It raided a power plant, so people think it energizes itself with electricity. Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives. They’ve been dubbed Ultra Beasts. Some of them stand unmoving, like trees, with their arms and legs stuck into the ground. Its base stats are 83 HP, 89 Attack, 71 Defense, 173 Special Attack, 71 Special Defense, 83 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 3.8 meters tall and weighs 100.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Eerie Impulse (level 29), Signal Beam (level 31), Thunderbolt (level 37), Hypnosis (level 43), Discharge (level 47), Magnet Rise (level 50). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Celesteela
text: Celesteela is a Steel and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Launch Pokémon. It appeared from the Ultra Wormhole. Witnesses observed it flying across the sky at high speed. One kind of Ultra Beast. Witnesses have seen it burn down a forest by expelling gas from its two arms. One of the dangerous UBs, high energy readings can be detected coming from both of its huge arms. Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives. Its base stats are 97 HP, 101 Attack, 103 Defense, 107 Special Attack, 101 Special Defense, 61 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 9.2 meters tall and weighs 999.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Metal Sound (level 23), Iron Head (level 29), Giga Drain (level 31), Flash Cannon (level 37), Autotomize (level 43), Seed Bomb (level 47). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Kartana
text: Kartana is a Grass and Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Drawn Sword Pokémon. This Ultra Beast came from the Ultra Wormhole. It seems not to attack enemies on its own, but its sharp body is a dangerous weapon in itself. One of the Ultra Beast life-forms, it was observed cutting down a gigantic steel tower with one stroke of its blade. This Ultra Beast’s body, which is as thin as paper, is like a sharpened sword. Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives. Its base stats are 59 HP, 181 Attack, 131 Defense, 59 Special Attack, 31 Special Defense, 109 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 0.1 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Aerial Ace (level 23), Laser Focus (level 29), Night Slash (level 31), Swords Dance (level 37), Leaf Blade (level 43), X Scissor (level 47). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Guzzlord
text: Guzzlord is a Dark and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Junkivore Pokémon. It has gobbled mountains and swallowed whole buildings, according to reports. It’s one of the Ultra Beasts. A dangerous Ultra Beast, it appears to be eating constantly, but for some reason its droppings have never been found. Although it’s alien to this world and a danger here, it’s apparently a common organism in the world where it normally lives. An unknown life-form called a UB. It may be constantly hungry—it is certainly always devouring something. Its base stats are 223 HP, 101 Attack, 53 Defense, 97 Special Attack, 53 Special Defense, 43 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 5.5 meters tall and weighs 888.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Stomping Tantrum (level 31), Body Slam (level 35), Crunch (level 37), Hammer Arm (level 43), Thrash (level 47), Gastro Acid (level 53). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Necrozma
text: Necrozma is a Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Prism Pokémon. Reminiscent of the Ultra Beasts, this life-form, apparently asleep underground, is thought to have come from another world in ancient times. Light is apparently the source of its energy. It has an extraordinarily vicious disposition and is constantly firing off laser beams. It looks somehow pained as it rages around in search of light, which serves as its energy. It’s apparently from another world. Light is the source of its energy. If it isn’t devouring light, impurities build up in it and on it, and Necrozma darkens and stops moving. It survives by absorbing light. After a long time spent slumbering underground, impurities accumulated within it, causing its body to darken. It needs light to survive, and it goes on a rampage seeking it out. Its laser beams will cut anything to pieces. Its base stats are 97 HP, 107 Attack, 101 Defense, 127 Special Attack, 89 Special Defense, 79 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 600. It has the abilities Prism Armor. It stands 2.4 meters tall and weighs 230.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Night Slash (level 23), Gravity (level 31), Psycho Cut (level 37), Power Gem (level 43), Autotomize (level 47), Photon Geyser (level 50). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Magearna
text: Magearna is a Steel and Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Artificial Pokémon. This artificial Pokémon, constructed more than 500 years ago, can understand human speech but cannot itself speak. Its mechanized body is merely a vessel. Its true self is its Soul-Heart, an artificial soul. It synchronizes its consciousness with others to understand their feelings. This faculty makes it useful for taking care of people. Built roughly 500 years ago by a scientist, the part called the Soul-Heart is the actual life-form. Its base stats are 80 HP, 95 Attack, 115 Defense, 130 Special Attack, 115 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 600. It has the abilities Soul Heart. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 80.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Lock On (level 42), Fleur Cannon (level 49), Trick (level 54), Iron Defense (level 57), Pain Split (level 65), Synchronoise (level 73). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Marshadow
text: Marshadow is a Fighting and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Gloomdweller Pokémon. Able to conceal itself in shadows, it never appears before humans, so its very existence was the stuff of myth. It lurks in the shadows of others, copying their movements and powers. This Pokémon is craven and cowering. It slips into the shadows of others and mimics their powers and movements. As it improves, it becomes stronger than those it’s imitating. It sinks into the shadows of people and Pokémon, where it can understand their feelings and copy their capabilities. By slipping into the shadow of a martial arts master and copying their movements, this Pokémon learned the ultimate techniques. This Pokémon can conceal itself in any shadow, so it went undiscovered for a long time. Its base stats are 90 HP, 125 Attack, 80 Defense, 90 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 125 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 600. It has the abilities Technician. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 22.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rolling Kick (level 15), Copycat (level 20), Shadow Punch (level 26), Role Play (level 30), Jump Kick (level 35), Psych Up (level 41). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Poipole
text: Poipole is a Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Poison Pin Pokémon. This Ultra Beast is well enough liked to be chosen as a first partner in its own world. An Ultra Beast that lives in a different world, it cackles wildly as it sprays its opponents with poison from the needles on its head. Its base stats are 67 HP, 73 Attack, 67 Defense, 73 Special Attack, 67 Special Defense, 73 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 420. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 1.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Dragon Pulse (level 1), Fury Attack (level 7), Venoshock (level 13), Charm (level 19), Venom Drench (level 23), Nasty Plot (level 31). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Naganadel
text: Naganadel is a Poison and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Poison Pin Pokémon. It evolves from Poipole. It stores hundreds of liters of poisonous liquid inside its body. It is one of the organisms known as UBs. One kind of Ultra Beast, it fires a glowing, venomous liquid from its needles. This liquid is also immensely adhesive. Its base stats are 73 HP, 73 Attack, 73 Defense, 127 Special Attack, 73 Special Defense, 121 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 540. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 3.6 meters tall and weighs 150.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Venoshock (level 13), Charm (level 19), Venom Drench (level 23), Nasty Plot (level 31), Poison Jab (level 37), Toxic (level 41). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Stakataka
text: Stakataka is a Rock and Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Rampart Pokémon. It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other. When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast. Its base stats are 61 HP, 131 Attack, 211 Defense, 53 Special Attack, 101 Special Defense, 13 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 5.5 meters tall and weighs 820.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Take Down (level 19), Block (level 20), Rock Throw (level 23), Autotomize (level 31), Iron Defense (level 37), Iron Head (level 43). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Blacephalon
text: Blacephalon is a Fire and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Fireworks Pokémon. It slithers toward people. Then, without warning, it triggers the explosion of its own head. It’s apparently one kind of Ultra Beast. A UB that appeared from an Ultra Wormhole, it causes explosions, then takes advantage of opponents’ surprise to rob them of their vitality. Its base stats are 53 HP, 127 Attack, 53 Defense, 151 Special Attack, 79 Special Defense, 107 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Beast Boost. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 13.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Light Screen (level 29), Incinerate (level 30), Calm Mind (level 31), Hypnosis (level 35), Fire Blast (level 37), Mystical Fire (level 40). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Zeraora
text: Zeraora is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Thunderclap Pokémon. It electrifies its claws and tears its opponents apart with them. Even if they dodge its attack, they’ll be electrocuted by the flying sparks. It approaches its enemies at the speed of lightning, then tears them limb from limb with its sharp claws. It runs as fast as lightning strikes, shredding its opponents with its high-voltage claws. Electricity sparks from the pads on its limbs. Wherever Zeraora runs, lightning flashes and thunder echoes. Its base stats are 88 HP, 112 Attack, 75 Defense, 102 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 143 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 600. It has the abilities Volt Absorb. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 44.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Fake Out (level 22), Charge (level 26), Thunder Punch (level 29), Slash (level 33), Wild Charge (level 36), Quick Guard (level 40). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Meltan
text: Meltan is a Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Hex Nut Pokémon. It melts particles of iron and other metals found in the subsoil, so it can absorb them into its body of molten steel. It dissolves and eats metal. Circulating liquid metal within its body is how it generates energy. They live as a group, but when the time comes, one strong Meltan will absorb all the others and evolve. Its base stats are 46 HP, 65 Attack, 65 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 34 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 300. It has the abilities Magnet Pull. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 8.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Headbutt (level 1), Harden (level 1), Tail Whip (level 9), Thunder Wave (level 18), Thunder Shock (level 27), Acid Armor (level 36). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Melmetal
text: Melmetal is a Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 7. It is known as the Hex Nut Pokémon. It evolves from Meltan. Revered long ago for its capacity to create iron from nothing, for some reason it has come back to life after 3,000 years. At the end of its life-span, Melmetal will rust and fall apart. The small shards left behind will eventually be reborn as Meltan. Centrifugal force is behind the punches of Melmetal’s heavy hex-nut arms. Melmetal is said to deliver the strongest punches of all Pokémon. Its base stats are 135 HP, 143 Attack, 143 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 34 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 600. It has the abilities Iron Fist. It stands 2.5 meters tall and weighs 800.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Thunder Shock (level 27), Acid Armor (level 36), Flash Cannon (level 45), Mega Punch (level 54), Protect (level 63), Discharge (level 64). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Grookey
text: Grookey is a Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Chimp Pokémon. When it uses its special stick to strike up a beat, the sound waves produced carry revitalizing energy to the plants and flowers in the area. It attacks with rapid beats of its stick. As it strikes with amazing speed, it gets more and more pumped. Its base stats are 50 HP, 65 Attack, 50 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 310. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Grassy Surge. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 5.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growl (level 1), Branch Poke (level 6), Taunt (level 8), Razor Leaf (level 12), Screech (level 17), Knock Off (level 20). It belongs to the Ground and Plant egg groups.

title: Thwackey
text: Thwackey is a Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Beat Pokémon. It evolves from Grookey. The faster a Thwackey can beat out a rhythm with its two sticks, the more respect it wins from its peers. When it’s drumming out rapid beats in battle, it gets so caught up in the rhythm that it won’t even notice that it’s already knocked out its opponent. Its base stats are 70 HP, 85 Attack, 70 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 80 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 420. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Grassy Surge. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 14.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growl (level 1), Taunt (level 1), Branch Poke (level 1), Razor Leaf (level 12), Screech (level 19), Knock Off (level 24). It belongs to the Ground and Plant egg groups.

title: Rillaboom
text: Rillaboom is a Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Drummer Pokémon. It evolves from Thwackey. By drumming, it taps into the power of its special tree stump. The roots of the stump follow its direction in battle. The one with the best drumming techniques becomes the boss of the troop. It has a gentle disposition and values harmony among its group. Its base stats are 100 HP, 125 Attack, 90 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Grassy Surge. It stands 2.1 meters tall and weighs 90.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Grassy Terrain (level 1), Branch Poke (level 1), Razor Leaf (level 12), Screech (level 19), Knock Off (level 24), Slam (level 30). It belongs to the Ground and Plant egg groups.

title: Scorbunny
text: Scorbunny is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Rabbit Pokémon. A warm-up of running around gets fire energy coursing through this Pokémon’s body. Once that happens, it’s ready to fight at full power. It has special pads on the backs of its feet, and one on its nose. Once it’s raring to fight, these pads radiate tremendous heat. Its base stats are 50 HP, 71 Attack, 40 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 69 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 310. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Libero. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 4.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growl (level 1), Ember (level 6), Quick Attack (level 8), Double Kick (level 12), Flame Charge (level 17), Agility (level 20). It belongs to the Ground and Humanshape egg groups.

title: Raboot
text: Raboot is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Rabbit Pokémon. It evolves from Scorbunny. Its thick and fluffy fur protects it from the cold and enables it to use hotter fire moves. It kicks berries right off the branches of trees and then juggles them with its feet, practicing its footwork. Its base stats are 65 HP, 86 Attack, 60 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 94 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 420. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Libero. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 9.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growl (level 1), Ember (level 1), Quick Attack (level 1), Double Kick (level 12), Flame Charge (level 19), Agility (level 24). It belongs to the Ground and Humanshape egg groups.

title: Cinderace
text: Cinderace is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Striker Pokémon. It evolves from Raboot. It juggles a pebble with its feet, turning it into a burning soccer ball. Its shots strike opponents hard and leave them scorched. It’s skilled at both offense and defense, and it gets pumped up when cheered on. But if it starts showboating, it could put itself in a tough spot. Its base stats are 80 HP, 116 Attack, 75 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 119 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Libero. It stands 1.4 meters tall and weighs 33.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Quick Attack (level 1), Feint (level 1), Double Kick (level 12), Flame Charge (level 19), Agility (level 24), Headbutt (level 30). It belongs to the Ground and Humanshape egg groups.

title: Sobble
text: Sobble is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Water Lizard Pokémon. When scared, this Pokémon cries. Its tears pack the chemical punch of 100 onions, and attackers won’t be able to resist weeping. When it gets wet, its skin changes color, and this Pokémon becomes invisible as if it were camouflaged. Its base stats are 50 HP, 40 Attack, 40 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 310. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Sniper. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 4.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growl (level 1), Water Gun (level 6), Bind (level 8), Water Pulse (level 12), Tearful Look (level 17), Sucker Punch (level 20). It belongs to the Water1 and Ground egg groups.

title: Drizzile
text: Drizzile is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Water Lizard Pokémon. It evolves from Sobble. A clever combatant, this Pokémon battles using water balloons created with moisture secreted from its palms. Highly intelligent but also very lazy, it keeps enemies out of its territory by laying traps everywhere. Its base stats are 65 HP, 60 Attack, 55 Defense, 95 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 420. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Sniper. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 11.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bind (level 1), Growl (level 1), Water Gun (level 1), Water Pulse (level 12), Tearful Look (level 19), Sucker Punch (level 24). It belongs to the Water1 and Ground egg groups.

title: Inteleon
text: Inteleon is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Secret Agent Pokémon. It evolves from Drizzile. It has many hidden capabilities, such as fingertips that can shoot water and a membrane on its back that it can use to glide through the air. Its nictitating membranes let it pick out foes’ weak points so it can precisely blast them with water that shoots from its fingertips at Mach 3. Its base stats are 70 HP, 85 Attack, 65 Defense, 125 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 120 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Sniper. It stands 1.9 meters tall and weighs 45.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Water Gun (level 1), Acrobatics (level 1), Water Pulse (level 12), Tearful Look (level 19), Sucker Punch (level 24), U Turn (level 30). It belongs to the Water1 and Ground egg groups.

title: Skwovet
text: Skwovet is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Cheeky Pokémon. Found throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon becomes uneasy if its cheeks are ever completely empty of berries. It eats berries nonstop—a habit that has made it more resilient than it looks. It’ll show up on farms, searching for yet more berries. Its base stats are 70 HP, 55 Attack, 55 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 25 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 275. It has the abilities Cheek Pouch, with the hidden ability Gluttony. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 2.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Stuff Cheeks (level 10), Stockpile (level 15), Spit Up (level 15), Swallow (level 15), Body Slam (level 20), Rest (level 25). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Greedent
text: Greedent is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Greedy Pokémon. It evolves from Skwovet. It stashes berries in its tail—so many berries that they fall out constantly. But this Pokémon is a bit slow-witted, so it doesn’t notice the loss. Common throughout the Galar region, this Pokémon has strong teeth and can chew through the toughest of berry shells. Its base stats are 120 HP, 95 Attack, 95 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 20 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 460. It has the abilities Cheek Pouch, with the hidden ability Gluttony. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 6.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Stuff Cheeks (level 1), Stockpile (level 15), Spit Up (level 15), Swallow (level 15), Body Slam (level 20), Rest (level 27). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Rookidee
text: Rookidee is a Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Tiny Bird Pokémon. It will bravely challenge any opponent, no matter how powerful. This Pokémon benefits from every battle—even a defeat increases its strength a bit. Jumping nimbly about, this small-bodied Pokémon takes advantage of even the slightest opportunity to disorient larger opponents. Its base stats are 38 HP, 47 Attack, 35 Defense, 33 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 57 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 245. It has the abilities Keen Eye and Unnerve, with the hidden ability Big Pecks. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 1.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Peck (level 1), Power Trip (level 4), Hone Claws (level 8), Fury Attack (level 12), Pluck (level 16), Taunt (level 20). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Corvisquire
text: Corvisquire is a Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Raven Pokémon. It evolves from Rookidee. Smart enough to use tools in battle, these Pokémon have been seen picking up rocks and flinging them or using ropes to wrap up enemies. The lessons of many harsh battles have taught it how to accurately judge an opponent’s strength. Its base stats are 68 HP, 67 Attack, 55 Defense, 43 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 77 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 365. It has the abilities Keen Eye and Unnerve, with the hidden ability Big Pecks. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 16.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Peck (level 1), Hone Claws (level 1), Power Trip (level 1), Fury Attack (level 12), Pluck (level 16), Taunt (level 22). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Corviknight
text: Corviknight is a Flying and Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Raven Pokémon. It evolves from Corvisquire. This Pokémon reigns supreme in the skies of the Galar region. The black luster of its steel body could drive terror into the heart of any foe. With their great intellect and flying skills, these Pokémon very successfully act as the Galar region’s airborne taxi service. Its base stats are 98 HP, 87 Attack, 105 Defense, 53 Special Attack, 85 Special Defense, 67 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 495. It has the abilities Pressure and Unnerve, with the hidden ability Mirror Armor. It stands 2.2 meters tall and weighs 75.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Iron Defense (level 1), Hone Claws (level 1), Power Trip (level 1), Fury Attack (level 12), Pluck (level 16), Taunt (level 22). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Blipbug
text: Blipbug is a Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Larva Pokémon. A constant collector of information, this Pokémon is very smart. Very strong is what it isn’t. Often found in gardens, this Pokémon has hairs on its body that it uses to assess its surroundings. Its base stats are 25 HP, 20 Attack, 20 Defense, 25 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 180. It has the abilities Swarm and Compound Eyes, with the hidden ability Telepathy. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 8.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Struggle Bug (level 1). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Dottler
text: Dottler is a Bug and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Radome Pokémon. It evolves from Blipbug. It barely moves, but it’s still alive. Hiding in its shell without food or water seems to have awakened its psychic powers. As it grows inside its shell, it uses its psychic abilities to monitor the outside world and prepare for evolution. Its base stats are 50 HP, 35 Attack, 80 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 335. It has the abilities Swarm and Compound Eyes, with the hidden ability Telepathy. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 19.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Struggle Bug (level 1). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Orbeetle
text: Orbeetle is a Bug and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Seven Spot Pokémon. It evolves from Dottler. It’s famous for its high level of intelligence, and the large size of its brain is proof that it also possesses immense psychic power. It emits psychic energy to observe and study what’s around it—and what’s around it can include things over six miles away. Its base stats are 60 HP, 45 Attack, 110 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 120 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505. It has the abilities Swarm and Frisk, with the hidden ability Telepathy. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 40.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Agility (level 12), Psybeam (level 16), Hypnosis (level 20), Ally Switch (level 24), Bug Buzz (level 28), Mirror Coat (level 32). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Nickit
text: Nickit is a Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Fox Pokémon. Aided by the soft pads on its feet, it silently raids the food stores of other Pokémon. It survives off its ill-gotten gains. Cunning and cautious, this Pokémon survives by stealing food from others. It erases its tracks with swipes of its tail as it makes off with its plunder. Its base stats are 40 HP, 28 Attack, 28 Defense, 47 Special Attack, 52 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 245. It has the abilities Run Away and Unburden, with the hidden ability Stakeout. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 8.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Quick Attack (level 1), Beat Up (level 4), Hone Claws (level 8), Snarl (level 12), Assurance (level 16), Nasty Plot (level 20). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Thievul
text: Thievul is a Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Fox Pokémon. It evolves from Nickit. It secretly marks potential targets with a scent. By following the scent, it stalks its targets and steals from them when they least expect it. With a lithe body and sharp claws, it goes around stealing food and eggs. Boltund is its natural enemy. Its base stats are 70 HP, 58 Attack, 58 Defense, 87 Special Attack, 92 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 455. It has the abilities Run Away and Unburden, with the hidden ability Stakeout. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 19.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Beat Up (level 1), Hone Claws (level 1), Snarl (level 12), Assurance (level 16), Nasty Plot (level 22), Sucker Punch (level 28). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Gossifleur
text: Gossifleur is a Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Flowering Pokémon. It anchors itself in the ground with its single leg, then basks in the sun. After absorbing enough sunlight, its petals spread as it blooms brilliantly. It whirls around in the wind while singing a joyous song. This delightful display has charmed many into raising this Pokémon. Its base stats are 40 HP, 40 Attack, 60 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 10 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 250. It has the abilities Cotton Down and Regenerator, with the hidden ability Effect Spore. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 2.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Leafage (level 1), Rapid Spin (level 4), Sweet Scent (level 8), Razor Leaf (level 12), Round (level 16), Leaf Tornado (level 21). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Eldegoss
text: Eldegoss is a Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Cotton Bloom Pokémon. It evolves from Gossifleur. The seeds attached to its cotton fluff are full of nutrients. It spreads them on the wind so that plants and other Pokémon can benefit from them. The cotton on the head of this Pokémon can be spun into a glossy, gorgeous yarn—a Galar regional specialty. Its base stats are 60 HP, 50 Attack, 90 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 120 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 460. It has the abilities Cotton Down and Regenerator, with the hidden ability Effect Spore. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 2.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sweet Scent (level 1), Leafage (level 1), Razor Leaf (level 12), Round (level 16), Leaf Tornado (level 23), Synthesis (level 28). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Wooloo
text: Wooloo is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Sheep Pokémon. Its curly fleece is such an effective cushion that this Pokémon could fall off a cliff and stand right back up at the bottom, unharmed. If its fleece grows too long, Wooloo won’t be able to move. Cloth made with the wool of this Pokémon is surprisingly strong. Its base stats are 42 HP, 40 Attack, 55 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 48 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 270. It has the abilities Fluffy and Run Away, with the hidden ability Bulletproof. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 6.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Defense Curl (level 4), Copycat (level 8), Guard Split (level 12), Double Kick (level 16), Headbutt (level 21), Take Down (level 25). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Dubwool
text: Dubwool is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Sheep Pokémon. It evolves from Wooloo. Weave a carpet from its springy wool, and you end up with something closer to a trampoline. You’ll start to bounce the moment you set foot on it. Its majestic horns are meant only to impress the opposite gender. They never see use in battle. Its base stats are 72 HP, 80 Attack, 100 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 88 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 490. It has the abilities Fluffy and Steadfast, with the hidden ability Bulletproof. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 43.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Copycat (level 1), Guard Split (level 12), Double Kick (level 16), Headbutt (level 21), Take Down (level 27), Guard Swap (level 32). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Chewtle
text: Chewtle is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Snapping Pokémon. Apparently the itch of its teething impels it to snap its jaws at anything in front of it. It starts off battles by attacking with its rock-hard horn, but as soon as the opponent flinches, this Pokémon bites down and never lets go. Its base stats are 50 HP, 64 Attack, 50 Defense, 38 Special Attack, 38 Special Defense, 44 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 284. It has the abilities Strong Jaw and Shell Armor, with the hidden ability Swift Swim. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 8.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Tackle (level 1), Water Gun (level 1), Bite (level 7), Protect (level 14), Headbutt (level 21), Counter (level 28). It belongs to the Monster and Water1 egg groups.

title: Drednaw
text: Drednaw is a Water and Rock type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Bite Pokémon. It evolves from Chewtle. With jaws that can shear through steel rods, this highly aggressive Pokémon chomps down on its unfortunate prey. This Pokémon rapidly extends its retractable neck to sink its sharp fangs into distant enemies and take them down. Its base stats are 90 HP, 115 Attack, 90 Defense, 48 Special Attack, 68 Special Defense, 74 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 485. It has the abilities Strong Jaw and Shell Armor, with the hidden ability Swift Swim. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 115.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Protect (level 1), Crunch (level 1), Rock Polish (level 1), Razor Shell (level 1), Headbutt (level 21), Counter (level 30). It belongs to the Monster and Water1 egg groups.

title: Yamper
text: Yamper is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Puppy Pokémon. This Pokémon is very popular as a herding dog in the Galar region. As it runs, it generates electricity from the base of its tail. This gluttonous Pokémon only assists people with their work because it wants treats. As it runs, it crackles with electricity. Its base stats are 59 HP, 45 Attack, 50 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 26 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 270. It has the abilities Ball Fetch, with the hidden ability Rattled. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 13.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Tail Whip (level 1), Nuzzle (level 5), Bite (level 10), Roar (level 15), Spark (level 20), Charm (level 26). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Boltund
text: Boltund is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Dog Pokémon. It evolves from Yamper. This Pokémon generates electricity and channels it into its legs to keep them going strong. Boltund can run nonstop for three full days. It sends electricity through its legs to boost their strength. Running at top speed, it easily breaks 50 mph. Its base stats are 69 HP, 90 Attack, 60 Defense, 90 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 121 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 490. It has the abilities Strong Jaw, with the hidden ability Competitive. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 34.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Electrify (level 1), Nuzzle (level 1), Roar (level 15), Spark (level 20), Charm (level 28), Crunch (level 34). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Rolycoly
text: Rolycoly is a Rock type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Coal Pokémon. Most of its body has the same composition as coal. Fittingly, this Pokémon was first discovered in coal mines about 400 years ago. It can race around like a unicycle, even on rough, rocky terrain. Burning coal sustains it. Its base stats are 30 HP, 40 Attack, 50 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 240. It has the abilities Steam Engine and Heatproof, with the hidden ability Flash Fire. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 12.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Tackle (level 1), Smokescreen (level 1), Rapid Spin (level 5), Smack Down (level 10), Rock Polish (level 15), Ancient Power (level 20). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Carkol
text: Carkol is a Rock and Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Coal Pokémon. It evolves from Rolycoly. It forms coal inside its body. Coal dropped by this Pokémon once helped fuel the lives of people in the Galar region. By rapidly rolling its legs, it can travel at over 18 mph. The temperature of the flames it breathes exceeds 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. Its base stats are 80 HP, 60 Attack, 90 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 410. It has the abilities Steam Engine and Flame Body, with the hidden ability Flash Fire. It stands 1.1 meters tall and weighs 78.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rapid Spin (level 1), Smack Down (level 1), Rock Polish (level 15), Ancient Power (level 20), Incinerate (level 27), Stealth Rock (level 35). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Coalossal
text: Coalossal is a Rock and Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Coal Pokémon. It evolves from Carkol. It’s usually peaceful, but the vandalism of mines enrages it. Offenders will be incinerated with flames that reach 2,700 degrees Fahrenheit. While it’s engaged in battle, its mountain of coal will burn bright red, sending off sparks that scorch the surrounding area. Its base stats are 110 HP, 80 Attack, 120 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Steam Engine and Flame Body, with the hidden ability Flash Fire. It stands 2.8 meters tall and weighs 310.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Smack Down (level 1), Flame Charge (level 1), Rock Polish (level 15), Ancient Power (level 20), Incinerate (level 27), Stealth Rock (level 37). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Applin
text: Applin is a Grass and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Apple Core Pokémon. It spends its entire life inside an apple. It hides from its natural enemies, bird Pokémon, by pretending it’s just an apple and nothing more. As soon as it’s born, it burrows into an apple. Not only does the apple serve as its food source, but the flavor of the fruit determines its evolution. Its base stats are 40 HP, 40 Attack, 80 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 20 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 260. It has the abilities Ripen and Gluttony, with the hidden ability Bulletproof. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 0.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Withdraw (level 1), Astonish (level 1). It belongs to the Plant and Dragon egg groups.

title: Flapple
text: Flapple is a Grass and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Apple Wing Pokémon. It evolves from Applin. It ate a sour apple, and that induced its evolution. In its cheeks, it stores an acid capable of causing chemical burns. It flies on wings of apple skin and spits a powerful acid. It can also change its shape into that of an apple. Its base stats are 70 HP, 110 Attack, 80 Defense, 95 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 485. It has the abilities Ripen and Gluttony, with the hidden ability Hustle. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 1.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Acrobatics (level 8), Leech Seed (level 12), Protect (level 16), Dragon Breath (level 20), Dragon Dance (level 24), Dragon Pulse (level 28). It belongs to the Plant and Dragon egg groups.

title: Appletun
text: Appletun is a Grass and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Apple Nectar Pokémon. It evolves from Applin. Eating a sweet apple caused its evolution. A nectarous scent wafts from its body, luring in the bug Pokémon it preys on. Its body is covered in sweet nectar, and the skin on its back is especially yummy. Children used to have it as a snack. Its base stats are 110 HP, 85 Attack, 80 Defense, 100 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 485. It has the abilities Ripen and Gluttony, with the hidden ability Thick Fat. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 13.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Stomp (level 8), Leech Seed (level 12), Protect (level 16), Bullet Seed (level 20), Recover (level 24), Apple Acid (level 28). It belongs to the Plant and Dragon egg groups.

title: Silicobra
text: Silicobra is a Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Sand Snake Pokémon. As it digs, it swallows sand and stores it in its neck pouch. The pouch can hold more than 17 pounds of sand. It spews sand from its nostrils. While the enemy is blinded, it burrows into the ground to hide. Its base stats are 52 HP, 57 Attack, 75 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 46 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 315. It has the abilities Sand Spit and Shed Skin, with the hidden ability Sand Veil. It stands 2.2 meters tall and weighs 7.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Minimize (level 5), Brutal Swing (level 10), Bulldoze (level 15), Headbutt (level 20), Glare (level 25), Dig (level 30). It belongs to the Ground and Dragon egg groups.

title: Sandaconda
text: Sandaconda is a Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Sand Snake Pokémon. It evolves from Silicobra. When it contracts its body, over 220 pounds of sand sprays from its nose. If it ever runs out of sand, it becomes disheartened. Its unique style of coiling allows it to blast sand out of its sand sac more efficiently. Its base stats are 72 HP, 107 Attack, 125 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 71 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Sand Spit and Shed Skin, with the hidden ability Sand Veil. It stands 3.8 meters tall and weighs 65.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Skull Bash (level 1), Brutal Swing (level 1), Bulldoze (level 15), Headbutt (level 20), Glare (level 25), Dig (level 30). It belongs to the Ground and Dragon egg groups.

title: Cramorant
text: Cramorant is a Flying and Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Gulp Pokémon. It’s so strong that it can knock out some opponents in a single hit, but it also may forget what it’s battling midfight. This hungry Pokémon swallows Arrokuda whole. Occasionally, it makes a mistake and tries to swallow a Pokémon other than its preferred prey. Its base stats are 70 HP, 85 Attack, 55 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 95 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 475. It has the abilities Gulp Missile. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 18.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Swallow (level 1), Belch (level 1), Water Gun (level 7), Fury Attack (level 14), Pluck (level 21), Dive (level 28). It belongs to the Water1 and Flying egg groups.

title: Arrokuda
text: Arrokuda is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Rush Pokémon. If it sees any movement around it, this Pokémon charges for it straightaway, leading with its sharply pointed jaw. It’s very proud of that jaw. After it’s eaten its fill, its movements become extremely sluggish. That’s when Cramorant swallows it up. Its base stats are 41 HP, 63 Attack, 40 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 30 Special Defense, 66 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 280. It has the abilities Swift Swim, with the hidden ability Propeller Tail. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 1.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Aqua Jet (level 1), Fury Attack (level 6), Bite (level 12), Agility (level 18), Dive (level 24), Focus Energy (level 30). It belongs to the Water2 egg groups.

title: Barraskewda
text: Barraskewda is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Skewer Pokémon. It evolves from Arrokuda. This Pokémon has a jaw that’s as sharp as a spear and as strong as steel. Apparently Barraskewda’s flesh is surprisingly tasty, too. It spins its tail fins to propel itself, surging forward at speeds of over 100 knots before ramming prey and spearing into them. Its base stats are 61 HP, 123 Attack, 60 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 136 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 490. It has the abilities Swift Swim, with the hidden ability Propeller Tail. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 30.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Peck (level 1), Aqua Jet (level 1), Throat Chop (level 1), Agility (level 18), Dive (level 24), Focus Energy (level 32). It belongs to the Water2 egg groups.

title: Toxel
text: Toxel is a Electric and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Baby Pokémon. It stores poison in an internal poison sac and secretes that poison through its skin. If you touch this Pokémon, a tingling sensation follows. It manipulates the chemical makeup of its poison to produce electricity. The voltage is weak, but it can cause a tingling paralysis. Its base stats are 40 HP, 38 Attack, 35 Defense, 54 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 40 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 242. It has the abilities Rattled and Static, with the hidden ability Klutz. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 11.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growl (level 1), Acid (level 1), Flail (level 1), Belch (level 1), Nuzzle (level 1), Tearful Look (level 1). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Toxtricity amped
text: Toxtricity amped is a Electric and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Punk Pokémon. It evolves from Toxel. When this Pokémon sounds as if it’s strumming a guitar, it’s actually clawing at the protrusions on its chest to generate electricity. This short-tempered and aggressive Pokémon chugs stagnant water to absorb any toxins it might contain. Its base stats are 75 HP, 98 Attack, 70 Defense, 114 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 502. It has the abilities Punk Rock and Plus, with the hidden ability Technician. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 40.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Taunt (level 16), Venoshock (level 20), Screech (level 24), Swagger (level 28), Toxic (level 32), Discharge (level 36). It belongs to the Humanshape egg groups.

title: Sizzlipede
text: Sizzlipede is a Fire and Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Radiator Pokémon. It stores flammable gas in its body and uses it to generate heat. The yellow sections on its belly get particularly hot. It wraps prey up with its heated body, cooking them in its coils. Once they’re well-done, it will voraciously nibble them down to the last morsel. Its base stats are 50 HP, 65 Attack, 45 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 305. It has the abilities Flash Fire and White Smoke, with the hidden ability Flame Body. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 1.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 10), Flame Wheel (level 15), Bug Bite (level 20), Coil (level 25), Slam (level 30), Fire Spin (level 35). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Centiskorch
text: Centiskorch is a Fire and Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Radiator Pokémon. It evolves from Sizzlipede. When it heats up, its body temperature reaches about 1,500 degrees Fahrenheit. It lashes its body like a whip and launches itself at enemies. While its burning body is already dangerous on its own, this excessively hostile Pokémon also has large and very sharp fangs. Its base stats are 100 HP, 115 Attack, 65 Defense, 90 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 525. It has the abilities Flash Fire and White Smoke, with the hidden ability Flame Body. It stands 3.0 meters tall and weighs 120.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Inferno (level 1), Flame Wheel (level 15), Bug Bite (level 20), Coil (level 25), Slam (level 32), Fire Spin (level 39). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Clobbopus
text: Clobbopus is a Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Tantrum Pokémon. It’s very curious, but its means of investigating things is to try to punch them with its tentacles. The search for food is what brings it onto land. Its tentacles tear off easily, but it isn’t alarmed when that happens—it knows they’ll grow back. It’s about as smart as a three-year-old. Its base stats are 50 HP, 68 Attack, 60 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 32 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 310. It has the abilities Limber, with the hidden ability Technician. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 4.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rock Smash (level 1), Feint (level 5), Bind (level 10), Detect (level 15), Brick Break (level 20), Bulk Up (level 25). It belongs to the Water1 and Humanshape egg groups.

title: Grapploct
text: Grapploct is a Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Jujitsu Pokémon. It evolves from Clobbopus. A body made up of nothing but muscle makes the grappling moves this Pokémon performs with its tentacles tremendously powerful. Searching for an opponent to test its skills against, it emerges onto land. Once the battle is over, it returns to the sea. Its base stats are 80 HP, 118 Attack, 90 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 42 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 480. It has the abilities Limber, with the hidden ability Technician. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 39.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rock Smash (level 1), Feint (level 1), Detect (level 15), Brick Break (level 20), Bulk Up (level 25), Submission (level 30). It belongs to the Water1 and Humanshape egg groups.

title: Sinistea
text: Sinistea is a Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Black Tea Pokémon. This Pokémon is said to have been born when a lonely spirit possessed a cold, leftover cup of tea. The teacup in which this Pokémon makes its home is a famous piece of antique tableware. Many forgeries are in circulation. Its base stats are 40 HP, 45 Attack, 45 Defense, 74 Special Attack, 54 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 308. It has the abilities Weak Armor, with the hidden ability Cursed Body. It stands 0.1 meters tall and weighs 0.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Mega Drain (level 12), Protect (level 18), Sucker Punch (level 24), Sweet Scent (level 30), Aromatherapy (level 30), Giga Drain (level 36). It belongs to the Mineral and Indeterminate egg groups.

title: Polteageist
text: Polteageist is a Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Black Tea Pokémon. It evolves from Sinistea. This species lives in antique teapots. Most pots are forgeries, but on rare occasions, an authentic work is found. Leaving leftover black tea unattended is asking for this Pokémon to come along and pour itself into it, turning the tea into a new Polteageist. Its base stats are 60 HP, 65 Attack, 65 Defense, 134 Special Attack, 114 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 508. It has the abilities Weak Armor, with the hidden ability Cursed Body. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 0.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Protect (level 18), Sucker Punch (level 24), Sweet Scent (level 30), Aromatherapy (level 30), Giga Drain (level 36), Nasty Plot (level 42). It belongs to the Mineral and Indeterminate egg groups.

title: Hatenna
text: Hatenna is a Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Calm Pokémon. Via the protrusion on its head, it senses other creatures’ emotions. If you don’t have a calm disposition, it will never warm up to you. If this Pokémon senses a strong emotion, it will run away as fast as it can. It prefers areas without people. Its base stats are 42 HP, 30 Attack, 45 Defense, 56 Special Attack, 53 Special Defense, 39 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 265. It has the abilities Healer and Anticipation, with the hidden ability Magic Bounce. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 3.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Life Dew (level 5), Disarming Voice (level 10), Aromatherapy (level 15), Aromatic Mist (level 15), Psybeam (level 20), Heal Pulse (level 25). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Hattrem
text: Hattrem is a Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Serene Pokémon. It evolves from Hatenna. No matter who you are, if you bring strong emotions near this Pokémon, it will silence you violently. Using the braids on its head, it pummels foes to get them to quiet down. One blow from those braids would knock out a professional boxer. Its base stats are 57 HP, 40 Attack, 65 Defense, 86 Special Attack, 73 Special Defense, 49 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 370. It has the abilities Healer and Anticipation, with the hidden ability Magic Bounce. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 4.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Play Nice (level 1), Life Dew (level 1), Aromatherapy (level 15), Aromatic Mist (level 15), Psybeam (level 20), Heal Pulse (level 25). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Hatterene
text: Hatterene is a Psychic and Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Silent Pokémon. It evolves from Hattrem. It emits psychic power strong enough to cause headaches as a deterrent to the approach of others. If you’re too loud around it, you risk being torn apart by the claws on its tentacle. This Pokémon is also known as the Forest Witch. Its base stats are 57 HP, 90 Attack, 95 Defense, 136 Special Attack, 103 Special Defense, 29 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Healer and Anticipation, with the hidden ability Magic Bounce. It stands 2.1 meters tall and weighs 5.1 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Life Dew (level 1), Aromatherapy (level 15), Aromatic Mist (level 15), Psybeam (level 20), Heal Pulse (level 25), Dazzling Gleam (level 30). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Impidimp
text: Impidimp is a Dark and Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Wily Pokémon. Through its nose, it sucks in the emanations produced by people and Pokémon when they feel annoyed. It thrives off this negative energy. It sneaks into people’s homes, stealing things and feasting on the negative energy of the frustrated occupants. Its base stats are 45 HP, 45 Attack, 30 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 265. It has the abilities Prankster and Frisk, with the hidden ability Pickpocket. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 5.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Flatter (level 8), Fake Tears (level 12), Assurance (level 16), Swagger (level 20), Sucker Punch (level 24), Torment (level 28). It belongs to the Fairy and Humanshape egg groups.

title: Morgrem
text: Morgrem is a Dark and Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Devious Pokémon. It evolves from Impidimp. When it gets down on all fours as if to beg for forgiveness, it’s trying to lure opponents in so that it can stab them with its spear-like hair. With sly cunning, it tries to lure people into the woods. Some believe it to have the power to make crops grow. Its base stats are 65 HP, 60 Attack, 45 Defense, 75 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 370. It has the abilities Prankster and Frisk, with the hidden ability Pickpocket. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 12.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Confide (level 1), Fake Tears (level 12), Assurance (level 16), Swagger (level 20), Sucker Punch (level 24), Torment (level 28). It belongs to the Fairy and Humanshape egg groups.

title: Grimmsnarl
text: Grimmsnarl is a Dark and Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Bulk Up Pokémon. It evolves from Morgrem. With the hair wrapped around its body helping to enhance its muscles, this Pokémon can overwhelm even Machamp. Its hairs work like muscle fibers. When its hairs unfurl, they latch on to opponents, ensnaring them as tentacles would. Its base stats are 95 HP, 120 Attack, 65 Defense, 95 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Prankster and Frisk, with the hidden ability Pickpocket. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 61.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Fake Tears (level 12), Assurance (level 16), Swagger (level 20), Sucker Punch (level 24), Torment (level 28), Dark Pulse (level 35). It belongs to the Fairy and Humanshape egg groups.

title: Obstagoon
text: Obstagoon is a Dark and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Blocking Pokémon. It evolves from Linoone. Its voice is staggering in volume. Obstagoon has a tendency to take on a threatening posture and shout—this move is known as Obstruct. It evolved after experiencing numerous fights. While crossing its arms, it lets out a shout that would make any opponent flinch. Its base stats are 93 HP, 90 Attack, 101 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 81 Special Defense, 95 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 520. It has the abilities Reckless and Guts, with the hidden ability Defiant. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 46.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Snarl (level 9), Headbutt (level 12), Hone Claws (level 15), Fury Swipes (level 18), Rest (level 23), Take Down (level 28). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Perrserker
text: Perrserker is a Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Viking Pokémon. It evolves from Meowth. What appears to be an iron helmet is actually hardened hair. This Pokémon lives for the thrill of battle. After many battles, it evolved dangerous claws that come together to form daggers when extended. Its base stats are 70 HP, 110 Attack, 100 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 440. It has the abilities Battle Armor and Tough Claws, with the hidden ability Steely Spirit. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 28.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Hone Claws (level 1), Pay Day (level 12), Metal Claw (level 16), Taunt (level 20), Swagger (level 24), Fury Swipes (level 31). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Cursola
text: Cursola is a Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Coral Pokémon. It evolves from Corsola. Its shell is overflowing with its heightened otherworldly energy. The ectoplasm serves as protection for this Pokémon’s core spirit. Be cautious of the ectoplasmic body surrounding its soul. You’ll become stiff as stone if you touch it. Its base stats are 60 HP, 95 Attack, 50 Defense, 145 Special Attack, 130 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Weak Armor, with the hidden ability Perish Body. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 0.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Astonish (level 1), Spite (level 15), Ancient Power (level 20), Hex (level 25), Curse (level 30), Strength Sap (level 35). It belongs to the Water1 and Water3 egg groups.

title: Sirfetchd
text: Sirfetchd is a Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Wild Duck Pokémon. It evolves from Farfetchd. Only Farfetch’d that have survived many battles can attain this evolution. When this Pokémon’s leek withers, it will retire from combat. After deflecting attacks with its hard leaf shield, it strikes back with its sharp leek stalk. The leek stalk is both weapon and food. Its base stats are 62 HP, 135 Attack, 95 Defense, 68 Special Attack, 82 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 507. It has the abilities Steadfast, with the hidden ability Scrappy. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 117.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Detect (level 25), Knock Off (level 30), Defog (level 35), Brick Break (level 40), Swords Dance (level 45), Slam (level 50). It belongs to the Flying and Ground egg groups.

title: Mr rime
text: Mr rime is a Ice and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Comedian Pokémon. It evolves from Mr-mime. It’s highly skilled at tap-dancing. It waves its cane of ice in time with its graceful movements. Its amusing movements make it very popular. It releases its psychic power from the pattern on its belly. Its base stats are 80 HP, 85 Attack, 75 Defense, 110 Special Attack, 100 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 520. It has the abilities Tangled Feet and Screen Cleaner, with the hidden ability Ice Body. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 58.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Ally Switch (level 16), Icy Wind (level 20), Double Kick (level 24), Psybeam (level 28), Hypnosis (level 32), Mirror Coat (level 36). It belongs to the Humanshape egg groups.

title: Runerigus
text: Runerigus is a Ground and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Grudge Pokémon. It evolves from Yamask. A powerful curse was woven into an ancient painting. After absorbing the spirit of a Yamask, the painting began to move. Never touch its shadowlike body, or you’ll be shown the horrific memories behind the picture carved into it. Its base stats are 58 HP, 95 Attack, 145 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 105 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 483. It has the abilities Wandering Spirit. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 66.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Crafty Shield (level 20), Hex (level 24), Mean Look (level 28), Slam (level 32), Curse (level 38), Shadow Ball (level 44). It belongs to the Mineral and Indeterminate egg groups.

title: Milcery
text: Milcery is a Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Cream Pokémon. This Pokémon was born from sweet-smelling particles in the air. Its body is made of cream. They say that any patisserie visited by Milcery is guaranteed success and good fortune. Its base stats are 45 HP, 40 Attack, 40 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 61 Special Defense, 34 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 270. It has the abilities Sweet Veil, with the hidden ability Aroma Veil. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 0.3 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sweet Scent (level 10), Draining Kiss (level 15), Charm (level 20), Aromatherapy (level 20), Attract (level 25), Acid Armor (level 30). It belongs to the Fairy and Indeterminate egg groups.

title: Alcremie
text: Alcremie is a Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Cream Pokémon. It evolves from Milcery. When it trusts a Trainer, it will treat them to berries it’s decorated with cream. When Alcremie is content, the cream it secretes from its hands becomes sweeter and richer. Its base stats are 65 HP, 60 Attack, 75 Defense, 110 Special Attack, 121 Special Defense, 64 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 495. It has the abilities Sweet Veil, with the hidden ability Aroma Veil. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 0.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Aromatic Mist (level 1), Draining Kiss (level 15), Charm (level 20), Aromatherapy (level 20), Attract (level 25), Acid Armor (level 30). It belongs to the Fairy and Indeterminate egg groups.

title: Falinks
text: Falinks is a Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Formation Pokémon. Five of them are troopers, and one is the brass. The brass’s orders are absolute. The six of them work together as one Pokémon. Teamwork is also their battle strategy, and they constantly change their formation as they fight. Its base stats are 65 HP, 100 Attack, 100 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 470. It has the abilities Battle Armor, with the hidden ability Defiant. It stands 3.0 meters tall and weighs 62.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Headbutt (level 15), Bulk Up (level 20), Endure (level 25), Reversal (level 30), First Impression (level 35), No Retreat (level 40). It belongs to the Fairy and Mineral egg groups.

title: Pincurchin
text: Pincurchin is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Sea Urchin Pokémon. It feeds on seaweed, using its teeth to scrape it off rocks. Electric current flows from the tips of its spines. It stores electricity in each spine. Even if one gets broken off, it still continues to emit electricity for at least three hours. Its base stats are 48 HP, 101 Attack, 95 Defense, 91 Special Attack, 85 Special Defense, 15 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 435. It has the abilities Lightning Rod, with the hidden ability Electric Surge. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 1.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Fury Attack (level 15), Spark (level 20), Bubble Beam (level 25), Recover (level 30), Curse (level 35), Electric Terrain (level 40). It belongs to the Water1 and Indeterminate egg groups.

title: Snom
text: Snom is a Ice and Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Worm Pokémon. It spits out thread imbued with a frigid sort of energy and uses it to tie its body to branches, disguising itself as an icicle while it sleeps. It eats snow that piles up on the ground. The more snow it eats, the bigger and more impressive the spikes on its back grow. Its base stats are 30 HP, 25 Attack, 35 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 30 Special Defense, 20 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 185. It has the abilities Shield Dust, with the hidden ability Ice Scales. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 3.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Powder Snow (level 1), Struggle Bug (level 1). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Frosmoth
text: Frosmoth is a Ice and Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Frost Moth Pokémon. It evolves from Snom. Icy scales fall from its wings like snow as it flies over fields and mountains. The temperature of its wings is less than −290 degrees Fahrenheit. It shows no mercy to any who desecrate fields and mountains. It will fly around on its icy wings, causing a blizzard to chase offenders away. Its base stats are 70 HP, 65 Attack, 60 Defense, 125 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 475. It has the abilities Shield Dust, with the hidden ability Ice Scales. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 42.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Feather Dance (level 21), Aurora Beam (level 24), Hail (level 28), Snowscape (level 28), Bug Buzz (level 32), Aurora Veil (level 36). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Stonjourner
text: Stonjourner is a Rock type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Big Rock Pokémon. It stands in grasslands, watching the sun’s descent from zenith to horizon. This Pokémon has a talent for delivering dynamic kicks. Once a year, on a specific date and at a specific time, they gather out of nowhere and form up in a circle. Its base stats are 100 HP, 125 Attack, 135 Defense, 20 Special Attack, 20 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 470. It has the abilities Power Spot. It stands 2.5 meters tall and weighs 520.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rock Tomb (level 12), Gravity (level 18), Stomp (level 24), Stealth Rock (level 30), Rock Slide (level 36), Body Slam (level 42). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Eiscue ice
text: Eiscue ice is a Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Penguin Pokémon. It drifted in on the flow of ocean waters from a frigid place. It keeps its head iced constantly to make sure it stays nice and cold. This Pokémon keeps its heat-sensitive head cool with ice. It fishes for its food, dangling its single hair into the sea to lure in prey. Its base stats are 75 HP, 80 Attack, 110 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 470. It has the abilities Ice Face. It stands 1.4 meters tall and weighs 89.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Weather Ball (level 12), Icy Wind (level 18), Headbutt (level 24), Amnesia (level 30), Freeze Dry (level 36), Hail (level 42). It belongs to the Water1 and Ground egg groups.

title: Indeedee male
text: Indeedee male is a Psychic and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Emotion Pokémon. It uses the horns on its head to sense the emotions of others. Males will act as valets for those they serve, looking after their every need. Through its horns, it can pick up on the emotions of creatures around it. Positive emotions are the source of its strength. Its base stats are 60 HP, 65 Attack, 55 Defense, 105 Special Attack, 95 Special Defense, 95 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 475. It has the abilities Inner Focus and Synchronize, with the hidden ability Psychic Surge. It stands 0.9 meters tall and weighs 28.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Psybeam (level 15), Helping Hand (level 20), After You (level 25), Aromatherapy (level 30), Healing Wish (level 30), Psychic (level 35). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Morpeko full belly
text: Morpeko full belly is a Electric and Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Two-Sided Pokémon. As it eats the seeds stored up in its pocket-like pouches, this Pokémon is not just satisfying its constant hunger. It’s also generating electricity. It carries electrically roasted seeds with it as if they’re precious treasures. No matter how much it eats, it always gets hungry again in short order. Its base stats are 58 HP, 95 Attack, 58 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 58 Special Defense, 97 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 436. It has the abilities Hunger Switch. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 3.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Quick Attack (level 15), Flatter (level 20), Bite (level 25), Spark (level 30), Torment (level 35), Agility (level 40). It belongs to the Ground and Fairy egg groups.

title: Cufant
text: Cufant is a Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Copperderm Pokémon. It digs up the ground with its trunk. It’s also very strong, being able to carry loads of over five tons without any problem at all. If a job requires serious strength, this Pokémon will excel at it. Its copper body tarnishes in the rain, turning a vibrant green color. Its base stats are 72 HP, 80 Attack, 49 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 49 Special Defense, 40 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 330. It has the abilities Sheer Force, with the hidden ability Heavy Metal. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 100.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rock Smash (level 10), Bulldoze (level 15), Stomp (level 20), Iron Defense (level 25), Dig (level 30), Strength (level 35). It belongs to the Ground and Mineral egg groups.

title: Copperajah
text: Copperajah is a Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Copperderm Pokémon. It evolves from Cufant. They came over from another region long ago and worked together with humans. Their green skin is resistant to water. These Pokémon live in herds. Their trunks have incredible grip strength, strong enough to crush giant rocks into powder. Its base stats are 122 HP, 130 Attack, 69 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 69 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 500. It has the abilities Sheer Force, with the hidden ability Heavy Metal. It stands 3.0 meters tall and weighs 650.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rock Smash (level 1), Bulldoze (level 15), Stomp (level 20), Iron Defense (level 25), Dig (level 30), Strength (level 37). It belongs to the Ground and Mineral egg groups.

title: Dracozolt
text: Dracozolt is a Electric and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Fossil Pokémon. In ancient times, it was unbeatable thanks to its powerful lower body, but it went extinct anyway after it depleted all its plant-based food sources. The powerful muscles in its tail generate its electricity. Compared to its lower body, its upper half is entirely too small. Its base stats are 90 HP, 100 Attack, 90 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505. It has the abilities Volt Absorb and Hustle, with the hidden ability Sand Rush. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 190.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Aerial Ace (level 14), Ancient Power (level 21), Pluck (level 28), Dragon Tail (level 35), Stomp (level 42), Slam (level 49). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Arctozolt
text: Arctozolt is a Electric and Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Fossil Pokémon. The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around. This Pokémon lived on prehistoric seashores and was able to preserve food with the ice on its body. It went extinct because it moved so slowly. Its base stats are 90 HP, 100 Attack, 90 Defense, 90 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 55 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505. It has the abilities Volt Absorb and Static, with the hidden ability Slush Rush. It stands 2.3 meters tall and weighs 150.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Echoed Voice (level 14), Ancient Power (level 21), Pluck (level 28), Avalanche (level 35), Freeze Dry (level 42), Slam (level 49). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Dracovish
text: Dracovish is a Water and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Fossil Pokémon. Powerful legs and jaws made it the apex predator of its time. Its own overhunting of its prey was what drove it to extinction. Its mighty legs are capable of running at speeds exceeding 40 mph, but this Pokémon can’t breathe unless it’s underwater. Its base stats are 90 HP, 90 Attack, 100 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505. It has the abilities Water Absorb and Strong Jaw, with the hidden ability Sand Rush. It stands 2.3 meters tall and weighs 215.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Brutal Swing (level 14), Ancient Power (level 21), Bite (level 28), Dragon Breath (level 35), Stomp (level 42), Super Fang (level 49). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Arctovish
text: Arctovish is a Water and Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Fossil Pokémon. Though it’s able to capture prey by freezing its surroundings, it has trouble eating the prey afterward because its mouth is on top of its head. The skin on its face is impervious to attack, but breathing difficulties made this Pokémon go extinct anyway. Its base stats are 90 HP, 90 Attack, 100 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 55 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505.
