It has the abilities Water Absorb and Ice Body, with the hidden ability Slush Rush. It stands 2.0 meters tall and weighs 175.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Icy Wind (level 14), Ancient Power (level 21), Bite (level 28), Aurora Veil (level 35), Freeze Dry (level 42), Super Fang (level 49). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Duraludon
text: Duraludon is a Steel and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Alloy Pokémon. Its body resembles polished metal, and it’s both lightweight and strong. The only drawback is that it rusts easily. The special metal that composes its body is very light, so this Pokémon has considerable agility. It lives in caves because it dislikes the rain. Its base stats are 70 HP, 95 Attack, 115 Defense, 120 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 535. It has the abilities Light Metal and Heavy Metal, with the hidden ability Stalwart. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 40.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Metal Sound (level 18), Breaking Swipe (level 24), Dragon Tail (level 30), Iron Defense (level 36), Focus Energy (level 42), Laser Focus (level 42). It belongs to the Mineral and Dragon egg groups.

title: Dreepy
text: Dreepy is a Dragon and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Lingering Pokémon. After being reborn as a ghost Pokémon, Dreepy wanders the areas it used to inhabit back when it was alive in prehistoric seas. If this weak Pokémon is by itself, a mere child could defeat it. But if Dreepy has friends to help it train, it can evolve and become much stronger. Its base stats are 28 HP, 60 Attack, 30 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 30 Special Defense, 82 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 270. It has the abilities Clear Body and Infiltrator, with the hidden ability Cursed Body. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 2.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 1), Quick Attack (level 1), Astonish (level 1), Infestation (level 1). It belongs to the Indeterminate and Dragon egg groups.

title: Drakloak
text: Drakloak is a Dragon and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Caretaker Pokémon. It evolves from Dreepy. It’s capable of flying faster than 120 mph. It battles alongside Dreepy and dotes on them until they successfully evolve. Without a Dreepy to place on its head and care for, it gets so uneasy it’ll try to substitute any Pokémon it finds for the missing Dreepy. Its base stats are 68 HP, 80 Attack, 50 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 102 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 410. It has the abilities Clear Body and Infiltrator, with the hidden ability Cursed Body. It stands 1.4 meters tall and weighs 11.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Hex (level 18), Agility (level 24), Double Hit (level 30), U Turn (level 36), Dragon Dance (level 42), Phantom Force (level 48). It belongs to the Indeterminate and Dragon egg groups.

title: Dragapult
text: Dragapult is a Dragon and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Stealth Pokémon. It evolves from Drakloak. When it isn’t battling, it keeps Dreepy in the holes on its horns. Once a fight starts, it launches the Dreepy like supersonic missiles. Apparently the Dreepy inside Dragapult’s horns eagerly look forward to being launched out at Mach speeds. Its base stats are 88 HP, 120 Attack, 75 Defense, 100 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 142 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 600. It has the abilities Clear Body and Infiltrator, with the hidden ability Cursed Body. It stands 3.0 meters tall and weighs 50.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Hex (level 18), Agility (level 24), Double Hit (level 30), U Turn (level 36), Dragon Dance (level 42), Phantom Force (level 48). It belongs to the Indeterminate and Dragon egg groups.

title: Zacian
text: Zacian is a Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Warrior Pokémon. Known as a legendary hero, this Pokémon absorbs metal particles, transforming them into a weapon it uses to battle. This Pokémon has slumbered for many years. Some say it’s Zamazenta’s elder sister—others say the two Pokémon are rivals. Its base stats are 92 HP, 120 Attack, 115 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 115 Special Defense, 138 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 660. It has the abilities Intrepid Sword. It stands 2.8 meters tall and weighs 110.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sacred Sword (level 1), Slash (level 11), Swords Dance (level 22), Iron Head (level 33), Noble Roar (level 44), Laser Focus (level 44). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Zamazenta
text: Zamazenta is a Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Warrior Pokémon. In times past, it worked together with a king of the people to save the Galar region. It absorbs metal that it then uses in battle. This Pokémon slept for aeons while in the form of a statue. It was asleep for so long, people forgot that it ever existed. Its base stats are 92 HP, 120 Attack, 115 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 115 Special Defense, 138 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 660. It has the abilities Dauntless Shield. It stands 2.9 meters tall and weighs 210.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Metal Burst (level 1), Wide Guard (level 1), Slash (level 11), Iron Defense (level 22), Iron Head (level 33), Laser Focus (level 44). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Eternatus
text: Eternatus is a Poison and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Gigantic Pokémon. The core on its chest absorbs energy emanating from the lands of the Galar region. This energy is what allows Eternatus to stay active. It was inside a meteorite that fell 20,000 years ago. There seems to be a connection between this Pokémon and the Dynamax phenomenon. Its base stats are 140 HP, 85 Attack, 95 Defense, 145 Special Attack, 95 Special Defense, 130 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 690. It has the abilities Pressure. It stands 20.0 meters tall and weighs 950.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Dragon Dance (level 24), Cross Poison (level 32), Dragon Pulse (level 40), Flamethrower (level 48), Dynamax Cannon (level 56), Cosmic Power (level 64). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Kubfu
text: Kubfu is a Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Wushu Pokémon. Kubfu trains hard to perfect its moves. The moves it masters will determine which form it takes when it evolves. If Kubfu pulls the long white hair on its head, its fighting spirit heightens and power wells up from the depths of its belly. Its base stats are 60 HP, 90 Attack, 60 Defense, 53 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 72 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 385. It has the abilities Inner Focus. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 12.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Scary Face (level 16), Headbutt (level 20), Brick Break (level 24), Detect (level 28), Bulk Up (level 32), Iron Head (level 36). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Urshifu single strike
text: Urshifu single strike is a Fighting and Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Wushu Pokémon. It evolves from Kubfu. This form of Urshifu is a strong believer in the one-hit KO. Its strategy is to leap in close to foes and land a devastating blow with a hardened fist. Inhabiting the mountains of a distant region, this Pokémon races across sheer cliffs, training its legs and refining its moves. Its base stats are 100 HP, 130 Attack, 100 Defense, 63 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 97 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 550. It has the abilities Unseen Fist. It stands 1.9 meters tall and weighs 105.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Scary Face (level 16), Headbutt (level 20), Brick Break (level 24), Detect (level 28), Bulk Up (level 32), Iron Head (level 36). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Zarude
text: Zarude is a Dark and Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Rogue Monkey Pokémon. Within dense forests, this Pokémon lives in a pack with others of its kind. It’s incredibly aggressive, and the other Pokémon of the forest fear it. Once the vines on Zarude’s body tear off, they become nutrients in the soil. This helps the plants of the forest grow. Its base stats are 105 HP, 120 Attack, 105 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 95 Special Defense, 105 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 600. It has the abilities Leaf Guard. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 70.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Grass Knot (level 36), Bite (level 42), U Turn (level 48), Swagger (level 54), Energy Ball (level 60), Synthesis (level 66). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Regieleki
text: Regieleki is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Electron Pokémon. This Pokémon is a cluster of electrical energy. It’s said that removing the rings on Regieleki’s body will unleash the Pokémon’s latent power. Its entire body is made up of a single organ that generates electrical energy. Regieleki is capable of creating all Galar’s electricity. Its base stats are 80 HP, 100 Attack, 50 Defense, 100 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 200 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 580. It has the abilities Transistor. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 145.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Thunder Wave (level 24), Extreme Speed (level 30), Thunder Cage (level 36), Thunderbolt (level 42), Magnet Rise (level 48), Thrash (level 54). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Regidrago
text: Regidrago is a Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Dragon Orb Pokémon. An academic theory proposes that Regidrago’s arms were once the head of an ancient dragon Pokémon. The theory remains unproven. Its body is composed of crystallized dragon energy. Regidrago is said to have the powers of every dragon Pokémon. Its base stats are 200 HP, 100 Attack, 50 Defense, 100 Special Attack, 50 Special Defense, 80 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 580. It has the abilities Dragons Maw. It stands 2.1 meters tall and weighs 200.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Focus Energy (level 24), Crunch (level 30), Dragon Claw (level 36), Hammer Arm (level 42), Dragon Dance (level 48), Thrash (level 54). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Glastrier
text: Glastrier is a Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Wild Horse Pokémon. Glastrier emits intense cold from its hooves. It’s also a belligerent Pokémon—anything it wants, it takes by force. Glastrier has tremendous physical strength, and the mask of ice covering its face is 100 times harder than diamond. Its base stats are 100 HP, 145 Attack, 130 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 110 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 580. It has the abilities Chilling Neigh. It stands 2.2 meters tall and weighs 800.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Stomp (level 18), Torment (level 24), Mist (level 30), Icicle Crash (level 36), Take Down (level 42), Iron Defense (level 48). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Spectrier
text: Spectrier is a Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Swift Horse Pokémon. It probes its surroundings with all its senses save one—it doesn’t use its sense of sight. Spectrier’s kicks are said to separate soul from body. As it dashes through the night, Spectrier absorbs the life-force of sleeping creatures. It craves silence and solitude. Its base stats are 100 HP, 65 Attack, 60 Defense, 145 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 130 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 580. It has the abilities Grim Neigh. It stands 2.0 meters tall and weighs 44.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Stomp (level 18), Confuse Ray (level 24), Haze (level 30), Shadow Ball (level 36), Take Down (level 42), Agility (level 48). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Calyrex
text: Calyrex is a Psychic and Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the King Pokémon. Calyrex is a merciful Pokémon, capable of providing healing and blessings. It reigned over the Galar region in times of yore. Calyrex is known in legend as a king that ruled over Galar in ancient times. It has the power to cause hearts to mend and plants to spring forth. Its base stats are 100 HP, 80 Attack, 80 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 80 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 500. It has the abilities Unnerve. It stands 1.1 meters tall and weighs 7.7 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Helping Hand (level 32), Aromatherapy (level 40), Grassy Terrain (level 40), Psychic Terrain (level 40), Energy Ball (level 48), Psychic (level 56). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Wyrdeer
text: Wyrdeer is a Normal and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Big Horn Pokémon. It evolves from Stantler. The black orbs shine with an uncanny light when the Pokémon is erecting invisible barriers. The fur shed from its beard retains heat well and is a highly useful material for winter clothing. Its base stats are 103 HP, 105 Attack, 72 Defense, 105 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 525. It has the abilities Intimidate and Frisk, with the hidden ability Sap Sipper. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 95.1 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sand Attack (level 16), Take Down (level 21), Psyshield Bash (level 21), Confuse Ray (level 23), Extrasensory (level 29), Role Play (level 32). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Kleavor
text: Kleavor is a Bug and Rock type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Axe Pokémon. It evolves from Scyther. A violent creature that fells towering trees with its crude axes and shields itself with hard stone. If one should chance upon this Pokémon in the wilds, one's only recourse is to flee. Its base stats are 70 HP, 135 Attack, 95 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 500. It has the abilities Swarm and Sheer Force, with the hidden ability Sharpness. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 89.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Double Team (level 16), Air Slash (level 18), Slash (level 24), Swords Dance (level 25), Focus Energy (level 28), Stone Axe (level 29). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Ursaluna
text: Ursaluna is a Ground and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Peat Pokémon. It evolves from Ursaring. I believe it was Hisui's swampy terrain that gave Ursaluna its burly physique and newfound capacity to manipulate peat at will. Its base stats are 130 HP, 140 Attack, 105 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 550. It has the abilities Guts and Bulletproof, with the hidden ability Unnerve. It stands 2.4 meters tall and weighs 290.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Play Rough (level 25), Play Nice (level 25), High Horsepower (level 34), Scary Face (level 35), Rest (level 41), Snore (level 41). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Basculegion male
text: Basculegion male is a Water and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Big Fish Pokémon. It evolves from Basculin. Clads itself in the souls of comrades that perished before fulfilling their goals of journeying upstream. No other species throughout all Hisui's rivers is Basculegion's equal. Its base stats are 120 HP, 112 Attack, 65 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 78 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Swift Swim and Adaptability, with the hidden ability Mold Breaker. It stands 3.0 meters tall and weighs 110.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Headbutt (level 24), Crunch (level 25), Shadow Ball (level 25), Soak (level 28), Wave Crash (level 34), Take Down (level 36). It belongs to the Water2 egg groups.

title: Sneasler
text: Sneasler is a Fighting and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Free Climb Pokémon. It evolves from Sneasel. Because of Sneasler's virulent poison and daunting physical prowess, no other species could hope to best it on the frozen highlands. Preferring solitude, this species does not form packs. Its base stats are 80 HP, 130 Attack, 60 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 120 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Pressure and Unburden, with the hidden ability Poison Touch. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 43.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Dire Claw (level 11), Slash (level 18), Metal Claw (level 18), Poison Jab (level 25), Brick Break (level 30), Swords Dance (level 34). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Overqwil
text: Overqwil is a Dark and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Pin Cluster Pokémon. It evolves from Qwilfish. Its lancelike spikes and savage temperament have earned it the nickname ”sea fiend.” It slurps up poison to nourish itself. Its base stats are 85 HP, 115 Attack, 95 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Poison Point and Swift Swim, with the hidden ability Intimidate. It stands 2.5 meters tall and weighs 60.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Toxic Spikes (level 36), Aqua Tail (level 37), Stockpile (level 40), Spit Up (level 40), Toxic (level 44), Double Edge (level 47). It belongs to the Water2 egg groups.

title: Enamorus incarnate
text: Enamorus incarnate is a Fairy and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 8. It is known as the Love-Hate Pokémon. When it flies to this land from across the sea, the bitter winter comes to an end. According to legend, this Pokémon's love gives rise to the budding of fresh life across Hisui. Its base stats are 74 HP, 115 Attack, 70 Defense, 135 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 106 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 580. It has the abilities Cute Charm, with the hidden ability Contrary. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 48.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Extrasensory (level 31), Mystical Fire (level 35), Dazzling Gleam (level 40), Crunch (level 41), Moonblast (level 47), Uproar (level 50). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Sprigatito
text: Sprigatito is a Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Grass Cat Pokémon. Its fluffy fur is similar in composition to plants. This Pokémon frequently washes its face to keep it from drying out. The sweet scent its body gives off mesmerizes those around it. The scent grows stronger when this Pokémon is in the sun. Its base stats are 40 HP, 61 Attack, 54 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 310. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Protean. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 4.1 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 7), Hone Claws (level 10), Magical Leaf (level 13), Quick Attack (level 15), Seed Bomb (level 17), U Turn (level 21). It belongs to the Ground and Plant egg groups.

title: Floragato
text: Floragato is a Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Grass Cat Pokémon. It evolves from Sprigatito. Floragato deftly wields the vine hidden beneath its long fur, slamming the hard flower bud against its opponents. The hardness of Floragato’s fur depends on the Pokémon’s mood. When Floragato is prepared to battle, its fur becomes pointed and needle sharp. Its base stats are 61 HP, 80 Attack, 63 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 63 Special Defense, 83 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 410. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Protean. It stands 0.9 meters tall and weighs 12.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Hone Claws (level 10), Magical Leaf (level 13), Quick Attack (level 15), Seed Bomb (level 20), U Turn (level 24), Worry Seed (level 28). It belongs to the Ground and Plant egg groups.

title: Meowscarada
text: Meowscarada is a Grass and Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Magician Pokémon. It evolves from Floragato. This Pokémon uses the reflective fur lining its cape to camouflage the stem of its flower, creating the illusion that the flower is floating. With skillful misdirection, it rigs foes with pollen-packed flower bombs. Meowscarada sets off the bombs before its foes realize what’s going on. Its base stats are 76 HP, 110 Attack, 70 Defense, 81 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 123 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Overgrow, with the hidden ability Protean. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 31.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Seed Bomb (level 20), U Turn (level 24), Worry Seed (level 29), Slash (level 33), Night Slash (level 38), Energy Ball (level 42). It belongs to the Ground and Plant egg groups.

title: Fuecoco
text: Fuecoco is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Fire Croc Pokémon. It lies on warm rocks and uses the heat absorbed by its square-shaped scales to create fire energy. Its flame sac is small, so energy is always leaking out. This energy is released from the dent atop Fuecoco’s head and flickers to and fro. Its base stats are 67 HP, 45 Attack, 59 Defense, 63 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 36 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 310. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Unaware. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 9.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Ember (level 1), Round (level 7), Bite (level 12), Incinerate (level 15), Yawn (level 17), Snarl (level 21). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Crocalor
text: Crocalor is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Fire Croc Pokémon. It evolves from Fuecoco. The combination of Crocalor’s fire energy and overflowing vitality has caused an egg-shaped fireball to appear on the Pokémon’s head. The valve in Crocalor’s flame sac is closely connected to its vocal cords. This Pokémon utters a guttural cry as it spews flames every which way. Its base stats are 81 HP, 55 Attack, 78 Defense, 90 Special Attack, 58 Special Defense, 49 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 411. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Unaware. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 30.7 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Round (level 10), Bite (level 12), Yawn (level 15), Incinerate (level 17), Snarl (level 24), Roar (level 28). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Skeledirge
text: Skeledirge is a Fire and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Singer Pokémon. It evolves from Crocalor. The fiery bird changes shape when Skeledirge sings. Rumor has it that the bird was born when the fireball on Skeledirge’s head gained a soul. Skeledirge’s gentle singing soothes the souls of all that hear it. It burns its enemies to a crisp with flames of over 5,400 degrees Fahrenheit. Its base stats are 104 HP, 75 Attack, 100 Defense, 110 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 66 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Blaze, with the hidden ability Unaware. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 326.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Incinerate (level 17), Snarl (level 24), Roar (level 28), Flamethrower (level 32), Shadow Ball (level 38), Hyper Voice (level 42). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Quaxly
text: Quaxly is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Duckling Pokémon. This Pokémon migrated to Paldea from distant lands long ago. The gel secreted by its feathers repels water and grime." Its strong legs let it easily swim around in even fast-flowing rivers. It likes to keep things tidy and is prone to overthinking things. Its base stats are 55 HP, 65 Attack, 45 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 310. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Moxie. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 6.1 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Water Gun (level 1), Work Up (level 7), Wing Attack (level 10), Aqua Jet (level 13), Double Hit (level 17), Aqua Cutter (level 21). It belongs to the Flying and Water1 egg groups.

title: Quaxwell
text: Quaxwell is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Practicing Pokémon. It evolves from Quaxly. These Pokémon constantly run through shallow waters to train their legs, then compete with each other to see which of them kicks most gracefully. The hardworking Quaxwell observes people and Pokémon from various regions and incorporates their movements into its own dance routines. Its base stats are 70 HP, 85 Attack, 65 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 410. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Moxie. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 21.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wing Attack (level 10), Aqua Jet (level 13), Water Pulse (level 17), Low Sweep (level 19), Aqua Cutter (level 23), Air Slash (level 27). It belongs to the Flying and Water1 egg groups.

title: Quaquaval
text: Quaquaval is a Water and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Dancer Pokémon. It evolves from Quaxwell. A single kick from a Quaquaval can send a truck rolling. This Pokémon uses its powerful legs to perform striking dances from far-off lands. Dancing in ways that evoke far-away places, this Pokémon mesmerizes all that see it. Flourishes of its decorative water feathers slice into its foes. Its base stats are 85 HP, 120 Attack, 80 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Torrent, with the hidden ability Moxie. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 61.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Low Sweep (level 17), Aqua Cutter (level 21), Air Slash (level 27), Focus Energy (level 32), Mega Kick (level 38), Acrobatics (level 43). It belongs to the Flying and Water1 egg groups.

title: Lechonk
text: Lechonk is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Hog Pokémon. It searches for food all day. It possesses a keen sense of smell but doesn’t use it for anything other than foraging. This Pokémon spurns all but the finest of foods. Its body gives off an herblike scent that bug Pokémon detest. Its base stats are 54 HP, 45 Attack, 40 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 35 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 254. It has the abilities Aroma Veil and Gluttony, with the hidden ability Thick Fat. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 10.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Echoed Voice (level 8), Mud Shot (level 12), Covet (level 15), Dig (level 17), Headbutt (level 21), Yawn (level 24). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Oinkologne male
text: Oinkologne male is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Hog Pokémon. It evolves from Lechonk. Oinkologne is proud of its fine, glossy skin. It emits a concentrated scent from the tip of its tail. It entrances female Pokémon with the sweet, alluring scent that wafts from all over its body. Its base stats are 110 HP, 100 Attack, 75 Defense, 59 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 489. It has the abilities Lingering Aroma and Gluttony, with the hidden ability Thick Fat. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 120.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Covet (level 15), Dig (level 17), Headbutt (level 23), Take Down (level 26), Yawn (level 27), Work Up (level 34). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Tarountula
text: Tarountula is a Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the String Ball Pokémon. The ball of threads wrapped around its body is elastic enough to deflect the scythes of Scyther, this Pokémon’s natural enemy. The thread it secretes from its rear is as strong as wire. The secret behind the thread’s strength is the topic of ongoing research. Its base stats are 35 HP, 41 Attack, 45 Defense, 29 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 20 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 210. It has the abilities Insomnia, with the hidden ability Stakeout. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 4.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Feint (level 11), Bug Bite (level 14), Block (level 18), Counter (level 22), Headbutt (level 25), Sticky Web (level 29). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Spidops
text: Spidops is a Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Trap Pokémon. It evolves from Tarountula. It clings to branches and ceilings using its threads and moves without a sound. It takes out its prey before the prey even notices it. Spidops covers its territory in tough, sticky threads to set up traps for intruders. Its base stats are 60 HP, 79 Attack, 92 Defense, 52 Special Attack, 86 Special Defense, 35 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 404. It has the abilities Insomnia, with the hidden ability Stakeout. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 16.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Feint (level 11), Bug Bite (level 14), Block (level 19), Counter (level 24), Headbutt (level 28), Sticky Web (level 33). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Nymble
text: Nymble is a Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Grasshopper Pokémon. It has its third set of legs folded up. When it’s in a tough spot, this Pokémon jumps over 30 feet using the strength of its legs. It’s highly skilled at a fighting style in which it uses its jumping capabilities to dodge incoming attacks while also dealing damage to opponents. Its base stats are 33 HP, 46 Attack, 40 Defense, 21 Special Attack, 25 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 210. It has the abilities Swarm, with the hidden ability Tinted Lens. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 1.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Astonish (level 6), Assurance (level 9), Double Kick (level 11), Screech (level 14), Endure (level 18), Bug Bite (level 22). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Lokix
text: Lokix is a Bug and Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Grasshopper Pokémon. It evolves from Nymble. When it decides to fight all out, it stands on its previously folded legs to enter Showdown Mode. It neutralizes its enemies in short order. It uses its normally folded third set of legs when in Showdown Mode. This places a huge burden on its body, so it can’t stay in this mode for long. Its base stats are 71 HP, 102 Attack, 78 Defense, 52 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 92 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 450. It has the abilities Swarm, with the hidden ability Tinted Lens. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 17.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Screech (level 14), Endure (level 18), Bug Bite (level 22), Feint (level 28), Agility (level 32), Throat Chop (level 36). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Pawmi
text: Pawmi is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Mouse Pokémon. It has underdeveloped electric sacs on its cheeks. These sacs can produce electricity only if Pawmi rubs them furiously with the pads on its forepaws. The pads of its paws are electricity-discharging organs. Pawmi fires electricity from its forepaws while standing unsteadily on its hind legs. Its base stats are 45 HP, 50 Attack, 20 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 25 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 240. It has the abilities Static and Natural Cure, with the hidden ability Iron Fist. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 2.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Nuzzle (level 12), Dig (level 15), Bite (level 19), Spark (level 23), Thunder Wave (level 27), Entrainment (level 31). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Pawmo
text: Pawmo is a Electric and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Mouse Pokémon. It evolves from Pawmi. When its group is attacked, Pawmo is the first to leap into battle, defeating enemies with a fighting technique that utilizes electric shocks. Pawmo uses a unique fighting technique in which it uses its forepaws to strike foes and zap them with electricity from its paw pads simultaneously. Its base stats are 60 HP, 75 Attack, 40 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 350. It has the abilities Volt Absorb and Natural Cure, with the hidden ability Iron Fist. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 6.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Nuzzle (level 12), Dig (level 15), Bite (level 19), Spark (level 23), Thunder Wave (level 27), Slam (level 32). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Pawmot
text: Pawmot is a Electric and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Hands-On Pokémon. It evolves from Pawmo. This Pokémon normally is slow to react, but once it enters battle, it will strike down its enemies with lightning-fast movements. Pawmot’s fluffy fur acts as a battery. It can store the same amount of electricity as an electric car. Its base stats are 70 HP, 115 Attack, 70 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 105 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 490. It has the abilities Volt Absorb and Natural Cure, with the hidden ability Iron Fist. It stands 0.9 meters tall and weighs 41.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 19), Spark (level 23), Arm Thrust (level 25), Thunder Wave (level 29), Slam (level 33), Entrainment (level 39). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Tandemaus
text: Tandemaus is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Couple Pokémon. Exhibiting great teamwork, they use their incisors to cut pieces out of any material that might be useful for a nest, then make off with them. The pair sticks together no matter what. They split any food they find exactly in half and then eat it together. Its base stats are 50 HP, 50 Attack, 45 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 305. It has the abilities Run Away and Pickup, with the hidden ability Own Tempo. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 1.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Super Fang (level 11), Double Hit (level 14), Bullet Seed (level 18), Encore (level 22), Play Rough (level 26), Hyper Voice (level 30). It belongs to the Ground and Fairy egg groups.

title: Maushold family of four
text: Maushold family of four is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Family Pokémon. It evolves from Tandemaus. The two little ones just appeared one day. The group might be a family of related Pokémon, but nobody knows for sure. The larger pair protects the little ones during battles. When facing strong opponents, the whole group will join the fight. Its base stats are 74 HP, 75 Attack, 70 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 111 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 470. It has the abilities Friend Guard and Cheek Pouch, with the hidden ability Technician. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 2.3 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Super Fang (level 11), Double Hit (level 14), Bullet Seed (level 18), Encore (level 22), Play Rough (level 29), Hyper Voice (level 33). It belongs to the Ground and Fairy egg groups.

title: Fidough
text: Fidough is a Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Puppy Pokémon. This Pokémon is smooth and moist to the touch. Yeast in Fidough’s breath induces fermentation in the Pokémon’s vicinity. The yeast in Fidough’s breath is useful for cooking, so this Pokémon has been protected by people since long ago. Its base stats are 37 HP, 55 Attack, 70 Defense, 30 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 312. It has the abilities Own Tempo, with the hidden ability Klutz. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 10.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 11), Baby Doll Eyes (level 15), Play Rough (level 18), Work Up (level 22), Baton Pass (level 26), Roar (level 30). It belongs to the Ground and Mineral egg groups.

title: Dachsbun
text: Dachsbun is a Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Dog Pokémon. It evolves from Fidough. The pleasant aroma that emanates from this Pokémon’s body helps wheat grow, so Dachsbun has been treasured by farming villages. The surface of this Pokémon’s skin hardens when exposed to intense heat, and its body has an appetizing aroma. Its base stats are 57 HP, 80 Attack, 115 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 95 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 477. It has the abilities Well Baked Body, with the hidden ability Aroma Veil. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 14.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 11), Baby Doll Eyes (level 15), Play Rough (level 18), Work Up (level 22), Baton Pass (level 29), Roar (level 33). It belongs to the Ground and Mineral egg groups.

title: Smoliv
text: Smoliv is a Grass and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Olive Pokémon. It protects itself from enemies by emitting oil from the fruit on its head. This oil is bitter and astringent enough to make someone flinch. This Pokémon converts nutrients into oil, which it stores in the fruit on its head. It can easily go a whole week without eating or drinking. Its base stats are 41 HP, 35 Attack, 45 Defense, 58 Special Attack, 51 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 260. It has the abilities Early Bird, with the hidden ability Harvest. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 6.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growth (level 7), Razor Leaf (level 10), Helping Hand (level 13), Flail (level 16), Mega Drain (level 20), Grassy Terrain (level 23). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Dolliv
text: Dolliv is a Grass and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Olive Pokémon. It evolves from Smoliv. Dolliv shares its tasty, fresh-scented oil with others. This species has coexisted with humans since times long gone. It basks in the sun to its heart’s content until the fruits on its head ripen. After that, Dolliv departs from human settlements and goes on a journey. Its base stats are 52 HP, 53 Attack, 60 Defense, 78 Special Attack, 78 Special Defense, 33 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 354. It has the abilities Early Bird, with the hidden ability Harvest. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 11.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growth (level 7), Razor Leaf (level 10), Helping Hand (level 13), Flail (level 16), Mega Drain (level 20), Grassy Terrain (level 23). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Arboliva
text: Arboliva is a Grass and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Olive Pokémon. It evolves from Dolliv. This calm Pokémon is very compassionate. It will share its delicious, nutrient-rich oil with weakened Pokémon. This Pokémon drives back enemies by launching its rich, aromatic oil at them with enough force to smash a boulder. Its base stats are 78 HP, 69 Attack, 90 Defense, 125 Special Attack, 109 Special Defense, 39 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 510. It has the abilities Seed Sower, with the hidden ability Harvest. It stands 1.4 meters tall and weighs 48.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Helping Hand (level 13), Flail (level 16), Mega Drain (level 20), Grassy Terrain (level 23), Seed Bomb (level 29), Energy Ball (level 34). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Squawkabilly green plumage
text: Squawkabilly green plumage is a Normal and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Parrot Pokémon. These Pokémon prefer to live in cities. They form flocks based on the color of their feathers, and they fight over territory. Green-feathered flocks hold the most sway. When they’re out searching for food in the mornings and evenings, it gets very noisy. Its base stats are 82 HP, 96 Attack, 51 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 51 Special Defense, 92 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 417. It has the abilities Intimidate and Hustle, with the hidden ability Guts. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 2.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Fury Attack (level 17), Taunt (level 20), Uproar (level 24), Copycat (level 27), Fly (level 30), Facade (level 34). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Nacli
text: Nacli is a Rock type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Rock Salt Pokémon. It was born in a layer of rock salt deep under the earth. This species was particularly treasured in the old days, as they would share precious salt. The ground scrapes its body as it travels, causing it to leave salt behind. Salt is constantly being created and replenished inside Nacli’s body. Its base stats are 55 HP, 55 Attack, 75 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 25 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 280. It has the abilities Purifying Salt and Sturdy, with the hidden ability Clear Body. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 16.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Smack Down (level 10), Rock Polish (level 13), Headbutt (level 16), Iron Defense (level 20), Recover (level 25), Rock Slide (level 30). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Naclstack
text: Naclstack is a Rock type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Rock Salt Pokémon. It evolves from Nacli. This Pokémon dry cures its prey by spraying salt over them. The curing process steals away the water in the prey’s body. It compresses rock salt inside its body and shoots out hardened salt pellets with enough force to perforate an iron sheet. Its base stats are 60 HP, 60 Attack, 100 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 35 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 355. It has the abilities Purifying Salt and Sturdy, with the hidden ability Clear Body. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 105.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Smack Down (level 10), Rock Polish (level 13), Headbutt (level 16), Iron Defense (level 20), Recover (level 30), Rock Slide (level 34). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Garganacl
text: Garganacl is a Rock type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Rock Salt Pokémon. It evolves from Naclstack. Garganacl will rub its fingertips together and sprinkle injured Pokémon with salt. Even severe wounds will promptly heal afterward. Many Pokémon gather around Garganacl, hoping to lick at its mineral-rich salt. Its base stats are 100 HP, 100 Attack, 130 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 35 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 500. It has the abilities Purifying Salt and Sturdy, with the hidden ability Clear Body. It stands 2.3 meters tall and weighs 240.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rock Polish (level 13), Headbutt (level 16), Salt Cure (level 24), Recover (level 30), Rock Slide (level 34), Stealth Rock (level 40). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Charcadet
text: Charcadet is a Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Fire Child Pokémon. Burnt charcoal came to life and became a Pokémon. Possessing a fiery fighting spirit, Charcadet will battle even tough opponents. Its firepower increases when it fights, reaching over 1,800 degrees Fahrenheit. It likes berries that are rich in fat. Its base stats are 40 HP, 50 Attack, 40 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 35 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 255. It has the abilities Flash Fire, with the hidden ability Flame Body. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 10.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Leer (level 1), Ember (level 1), Astonish (level 1), Clear Smog (level 8), Fire Spin (level 12), Will O Wisp (level 16). It belongs to the Humanshape egg groups.

title: Armarouge
text: Armarouge is a Fire and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Fire Warrior Pokémon. It evolves from Charcadet. Armarouge evolved through the use of a set of armor that belonged to a distinguished warrior. This Pokémon is incredibly loyal. This Pokémon clads itself in armor that has been fortified by psychic and fire energy, and it shoots blazing fireballs. Its base stats are 85 HP, 60 Attack, 100 Defense, 125 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 525. It has the abilities Flash Fire, with the hidden ability Weak Armor. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 85.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Will O Wisp (level 16), Night Shade (level 20), Flame Charge (level 24), Incinerate (level 28), Lava Plume (level 32), Calm Mind (level 37). It belongs to the Humanshape egg groups.

title: Ceruledge
text: Ceruledge is a Fire and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Fire Blades Pokémon. It evolves from Charcadet. The fiery blades on its arms burn fiercely with the lingering resentment of a sword wielder who fell before accomplishing their goal. An old set of armor steeped in grudges caused this Pokémon’s evolution. Ceruledge cuts its enemies to pieces without mercy. Its base stats are 75 HP, 125 Attack, 80 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 100 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 525. It has the abilities Flash Fire, with the hidden ability Weak Armor. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 62.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Will O Wisp (level 16), Night Shade (level 20), Flame Charge (level 24), Incinerate (level 28), Lava Plume (level 32), Swords Dance (level 37). It belongs to the Humanshape egg groups.

title: Tadbulb
text: Tadbulb is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the EleTadpole Pokémon. Tadbulb shakes its tail to generate electricity. If it senses danger, it will make its head blink on and off to alert its allies. It floats using the electricity stored in its body. When thunderclouds are around, Tadbulb will float higher off the ground. Its base stats are 61 HP, 31 Attack, 41 Defense, 59 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 272. It has the abilities Own Tempo and Static, with the hidden ability Damp. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 0.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Water Gun (level 11), Charge (level 17), Spark (level 21), Mud Shot (level 24), Flail (level 25), Discharge (level 32). It belongs to the Water1 egg groups.

title: Bellibolt
text: Bellibolt is a Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the EleFrog Pokémon. It evolves from Tadbulb. When this Pokémon expands and contracts its wobbly body, the belly-button dynamo in its stomach produces a huge amount of electricity. What appear to be eyeballs are actually organs for discharging the electricity generated by Bellibolt’s belly-button dynamo. Its base stats are 109 HP, 64 Attack, 91 Defense, 103 Special Attack, 83 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 495. It has the abilities Electromorphosis and Static, with the hidden ability Damp. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 113.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Water Gun (level 11), Charge (level 17), Spark (level 21), Mud Shot (level 24), Flail (level 25), Discharge (level 32). It belongs to the Water1 egg groups.

title: Wattrel
text: Wattrel is a Electric and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Storm Petrel Pokémon. When its wings catch the wind, the bones within produce electricity. This Pokémon dives into the ocean, catching prey by electrocuting them. These Pokémon make their nests on coastal cliffs. The nests have a strange, crackling texture, and they’re a popular delicacy. Its base stats are 40 HP, 40 Attack, 35 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 280. It has the abilities Wind Power and Volt Absorb, with the hidden ability Competitive. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 3.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Thunder Shock (level 4), Quick Attack (level 7), Pluck (level 11), Spark (level 15), Uproar (level 19), Roost (level 23). It belongs to the Water1 and Flying egg groups.

title: Kilowattrel
text: Kilowattrel is a Electric and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Frigatebird Pokémon. It evolves from Wattrel. Kilowattrel inflates its throat sac to amplify its electricity. By riding the wind, this Pokémon can fly over 430 miles in a day. It uses its throat sac to store electricity generated by its wings. There’s hardly any oil in its feathers, so it is a poor swimmer. Its base stats are 70 HP, 70 Attack, 60 Defense, 105 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 125 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 490. It has the abilities Wind Power and Volt Absorb, with the hidden ability Competitive. It stands 1.4 meters tall and weighs 38.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Quick Attack (level 7), Pluck (level 11), Spark (level 15), Uproar (level 19), Roost (level 24), Dual Wingbeat (level 30). It belongs to the Water1 and Flying egg groups.

title: Maschiff
text: Maschiff is a Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Rascal Pokémon. It always scowls in an attempt to make opponents take it seriously, but even crying children will burst into laughter when they see Maschiff’s face. Its well-developed jaw and fangs are strong enough to crunch through boulders, and its thick fat makes for an excellent defense. Its base stats are 60 HP, 78 Attack, 60 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 51 Special Defense, 51 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 340. It has the abilities Intimidate and Run Away, with the hidden ability Stakeout. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 16.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Hone Claws (level 10), Bite (level 14), Roar (level 18), Headbutt (level 22), Payback (level 26), Crunch (level 31). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Mabosstiff
text: Mabosstiff is a Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Boss Pokémon. It evolves from Maschiff. This Pokémon can store energy in its large dewlap. Mabosstiff unleashes this energy all at once to blow away enemies. Mabosstiff loves playing with children. Though usually gentle, it takes on an intimidating look when protecting its family. Its base stats are 80 HP, 120 Attack, 90 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 85 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 505. It has the abilities Intimidate and Guard Dog, with the hidden ability Stakeout. It stands 1.1 meters tall and weighs 61.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 14), Roar (level 18), Headbutt (level 22), Payback (level 26), Crunch (level 34), Swagger (level 39). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Shroodle
text: Shroodle is a Poison and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Toxic Mouse Pokémon. Though usually a mellow Pokémon, it will sink its sharp, poison-soaked front teeth into any that anger it, causing paralysis in the object of its ire. To keep enemies away from its territory, it paints markings around its nest using a poisonous liquid that has an acrid odor. Its base stats are 40 HP, 65 Attack, 35 Defense, 40 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 290. It has the abilities Unburden and Pickpocket, with the hidden ability Prankster. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 0.7 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Switcheroo (level 11), Poison Fang (level 14), Flatter (level 18), Slash (level 21), U Turn (level 25), Poison Jab (level 29). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Grafaiai
text: Grafaiai is a Poison and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Toxic Monkey Pokémon. It evolves from Shroodle. The color of the poisonous saliva depends on what the Pokémon eats. Grafaiai covers its fingers in its saliva and draws patterns on trees in forests. Each Grafaiai paints its own individual pattern, and it will paint that same pattern over and over again throughout its life. Its base stats are 63 HP, 95 Attack, 65 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 72 Special Defense, 110 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 485. It has the abilities Unburden and Poison Touch, with the hidden ability Prankster. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 27.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Switcheroo (level 11), Poison Fang (level 14), Flatter (level 18), Slash (level 21), U Turn (level 25), Poison Jab (level 33). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Bramblin
text: Bramblin is a Grass and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Tumbleweed Pokémon. A soul unable to move on to the afterlife was blown around by the wind until it got tangled up with dried grass and became a Pokémon. Not even Bramblin knows where it is headed as it tumbles across the wilderness, blown by the wind. It loathes getting wet. Its base stats are 40 HP, 65 Attack, 30 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 35 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 275. It has the abilities Wind Rider, with the hidden ability Infiltrator. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 0.6 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bullet Seed (level 13), Infestation (level 17), Hex (level 21), Mega Drain (level 25), Disable (level 29), Phantom Force (level 35). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Brambleghast
text: Brambleghast is a Grass and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Tumbleweed Pokémon. It evolves from Bramblin. It will open the branches of its head to envelop its prey. Once it absorbs all the life energy it needs, it expels the prey and discards it. Brambleghast wanders around arid regions. On rare occasions, mass outbreaks of these Pokémon will bury an entire town. Its base stats are 55 HP, 115 Attack, 70 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 480. It has the abilities Wind Rider, with the hidden ability Infiltrator. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 6.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bullet Seed (level 13), Infestation (level 17), Hex (level 21), Mega Drain (level 25), Disable (level 29), Phantom Force (level 35). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Toedscool
text: Toedscool is a Ground and Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Woodear Pokémon. Toedscool lives in muggy forests. The flaps that fall from its body are chewy and very delicious. Though it looks like Tentacool, Toedscool is a completely different species. Its legs may be thin, but it can run at a speed of 30 mph. Its base stats are 40 HP, 40 Attack, 35 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 100 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 335. It has the abilities Mycelium Might. It stands 0.9 meters tall and weighs 33.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Mega Drain (level 16), Screech (level 20), Mud Shot (level 24), Hex (level 28), Seed Bomb (level 32), Spore (level 36). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Toedscruel
text: Toedscruel is a Ground and Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Woodear Pokémon. It evolves from Toedscool. These Pokémon gather into groups and form colonies deep within forests. They absolutely hate it when strangers approach. It coils its 10 tentacles around prey and sucks out their nutrients, causing the prey pain. The folds along the rim of its head are a popular delicacy. Its base stats are 80 HP, 70 Attack, 65 Defense, 80 Special Attack, 120 Special Defense, 100 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 515. It has the abilities Mycelium Might. It stands 1.9 meters tall and weighs 58.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Mega Drain (level 16), Screech (level 20), Mud Shot (level 24), Hex (level 28), Seed Bomb (level 34), Spore (level 40). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Klawf
text: Klawf is a Rock type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ambush Pokémon. Klawf hangs upside-down from cliffs, waiting for prey. But Klawf can’t remain in this position for long because its blood rushes to its head. This Pokémon lives on sheer cliffs. It sidesteps opponents’ attacks, then lunges for their weak spots with its claws. Its base stats are 70 HP, 100 Attack, 115 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 450. It has the abilities Anger Shell and Shell Armor, with the hidden ability Regenerator. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 79.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Metal Claw (level 17), Protect (level 21), Rock Blast (level 24), X Scissor (level 29), Swords Dance (level 33), Flail (level 37). It belongs to the Water3 egg groups.

title: Capsakid
text: Capsakid is a Grass type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Spicy Pepper Pokémon. The more sunlight this Pokémon bathes in, the more spicy chemicals are produced by its body, and thus the spicier its moves become. Traditional Paldean dishes can be extremely spicy because they include the shed front teeth of Capsakid among their ingredients. Its base stats are 50 HP, 62 Attack, 40 Defense, 62 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 304. It has the abilities Chlorophyll and Insomnia, with the hidden ability Klutz. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 3.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Bite (level 4), Growth (level 10), Razor Leaf (level 13), Sunny Day (level 17), Bullet Seed (level 21), Headbutt (level 24). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Scovillain
text: Scovillain is a Grass and Fire type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Spicy Pepper Pokémon. It evolves from Capsakid. The red head converts spicy chemicals into fire energy and blasts the surrounding area with a super spicy stream of flame. The green head has turned vicious due to the spicy chemicals stimulating its brain. Once it goes on a rampage, there is no stopping it. Its base stats are 65 HP, 108 Attack, 65 Defense, 108 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 486. It has the abilities Chlorophyll and Insomnia, with the hidden ability Moody. It stands 0.9 meters tall and weighs 15.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Razor Leaf (level 13), Sunny Day (level 17), Bullet Seed (level 21), Headbutt (level 24), Zen Headbutt (level 28), Worry Seed (level 33). It belongs to the Plant egg groups.

title: Rellor
text: Rellor is a Bug type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Rolling Pokémon. This Pokémon creates a mud ball by mixing sand and dirt with psychic energy. It treasures its mud ball more than its own life. It rolls its mud ball around while the energy it needs for evolution matures. Eventually the time comes for it to evolve. Its base stats are 41 HP, 50 Attack, 60 Defense, 31 Special Attack, 58 Special Defense, 30 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 270. It has the abilities Compound Eyes, with the hidden ability Shed Skin. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 1.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Tackle (level 1), Defense Curl (level 1), Sand Attack (level 4), Struggle Bug (level 7), Rollout (level 11), Mud Shot (level 15). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Rabsca
text: Rabsca is a Bug and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Rolling Pokémon. It evolves from Rellor. The body that supports the ball barely moves. Therefore, it is thought that the true body of this Pokémon is actually inside the ball. An infant sleeps inside the ball. Rabsca rolls the ball soothingly with its legs to ensure the infant sleeps comfortably. Its base stats are 75 HP, 50 Attack, 85 Defense, 115 Special Attack, 100 Special Defense, 45 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 470. It has the abilities Synchronize, with the hidden ability Telepathy. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 3.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Psybeam (level 15), Bug Bite (level 20), Take Down (level 24), Extrasensory (level 29), Lunge (level 35), Power Swap (level 40). It belongs to the Bug egg groups.

title: Flittle
text: Flittle is a Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Frill Pokémon. Flittle’s toes levitate about half an inch above the ground because of the psychic power emitted from the frills on the Pokémon’s belly. It spends its time running around wastelands. If anyone steals its beloved berries, it will chase them down and exact its revenge. Its base stats are 30 HP, 35 Attack, 30 Defense, 55 Special Attack, 30 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 255. It has the abilities Anticipation and Frisk, with the hidden ability Speed Boost. It stands 0.2 meters tall and weighs 1.5 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Growl (level 1), Peck (level 1), Confusion (level 5), Baby Doll Eyes (level 8), Disarming Voice (level 11), Quick Attack (level 15). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Espathra
text: Espathra is a Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ostrich Pokémon. It evolves from Flittle. It immobilizes opponents by bathing them in psychic power from its large eyes. Despite its appearance, it has a vicious temperament. It emits psychic power from the gaps between its multicolored frills and sprints at speeds greater than 120 mph. Its base stats are 95 HP, 60 Attack, 60 Defense, 101 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 105 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 481. It has the abilities Opportunist and Frisk, with the hidden ability Speed Boost. It stands 1.9 meters tall and weighs 90.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Baby Doll Eyes (level 8), Disarming Voice (level 11), Quick Attack (level 15), Psybeam (level 19), Pluck (level 24), Agility (level 29). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Tinkatink
text: Tinkatink is a Fairy and Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Metalsmith Pokémon. It swings its handmade hammer around to protect itself, but the hammer is often stolen by Pokémon that eat metal. This Pokémon pounds iron scraps together to make a hammer. It will remake the hammer again and again until it’s satisfied with the result. Its base stats are 50 HP, 45 Attack, 45 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 64 Special Defense, 58 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 297. It has the abilities Mold Breaker and Own Tempo, with the hidden ability Pickpocket. It stands 0.4 meters tall and weighs 8.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Draining Kiss (level 17), Sweet Kiss (level 21), Brutal Swing (level 24), Slam (level 27), Flash Cannon (level 31), Play Rough (level 35). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Tinkatuff
text: Tinkatuff is a Fairy and Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Hammer Pokémon. It evolves from Tinkatink. This Pokémon will attack groups of Pawniard and Bisharp, gathering metal from them in order to create a large and sturdy hammer. These Pokémon make their homes in piles of scrap metal. They test the strength of each other’s hammers by smashing them together. Its base stats are 65 HP, 55 Attack, 55 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 82 Special Defense, 78 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 380. It has the abilities Mold Breaker and Own Tempo, with the hidden ability Pickpocket. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 59.1 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Draining Kiss (level 17), Sweet Kiss (level 21), Brutal Swing (level 24), Slam (level 27), Flash Cannon (level 31), Play Rough (level 35). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Tinkaton
text: Tinkaton is a Fairy and Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Hammer Pokémon. It evolves from Tinkatuff. This intelligent Pokémon has a very daring disposition. It knocks rocks into the sky with its hammer, aiming for flying Corviknight. The hammer tops 220 pounds, yet it gets swung around easily by Tinkaton as it steals whatever it pleases and carries its plunder back home. Its base stats are 85 HP, 75 Attack, 77 Defense, 70 Special Attack, 105 Special Defense, 94 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 506. It has the abilities Mold Breaker and Own Tempo, with the hidden ability Pickpocket. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 112.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Draining Kiss (level 17), Sweet Kiss (level 21), Brutal Swing (level 24), Slam (level 27), Flash Cannon (level 31), Play Rough (level 35). It belongs to the Fairy egg groups.

title: Wiglett
text: Wiglett is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Garden Eel Pokémon. This Pokémon can pick up the scent of a Veluza just over 65 feet away and will hide itself in the sand. Though it looks like Diglett, Wiglett is an entirely different species. The resemblance seems to be a coincidental result of environmental adaptation. Its base stats are 10 HP, 55 Attack, 25 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 25 Special Defense, 95 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 245. It has the abilities Gooey and Rattled, with the hidden ability Sand Veil. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 1.8 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Mud Slap (level 4), Wrap (level 8), Aqua Jet (level 12), Slam (level 20), Water Pulse (level 20), Headbutt (level 24). It belongs to the Water3 egg groups.

title: Wugtrio
text: Wugtrio is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Garden Eel Pokémon. It evolves from Wiglett. It has a vicious temperament, contrary to what its appearance may suggest. It wraps its long bodies around prey, then drags the prey into its den. A variety of fish Pokémon, Wugtrio was once considered to be a regional form of Dugtrio. Its base stats are 35 HP, 100 Attack, 50 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 120 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 425. It has the abilities Gooey and Rattled, with the hidden ability Sand Veil. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 5.4 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Mud Slap (level 1), Aqua Jet (level 12), Slam (level 16), Water Pulse (level 20), Headbutt (level 24), Triple Dive (level 30). It belongs to the Water3 egg groups.

title: Bombirdier
text: Bombirdier is a Flying and Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Item Drop Pokémon. It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun. Bombirdier uses the apron on its chest to bundle up food, which it carries back to its nest. It enjoys dropping things that make loud noises. Its base stats are 70 HP, 103 Attack, 85 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 85 Special Defense, 82 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 485. It has the abilities Big Pecks and Keen Eye, with the hidden ability Rocky Payload. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 42.9 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rock Throw (level 11), Whirlwind (level 16), Pluck (level 20), Torment (level 24), Rock Tomb (level 29), Payback (level 36). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Finizen
text: Finizen is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Dolphin Pokémon. It likes playing with others of its kind using the water ring on its tail. It uses ultrasonic waves to sense the emotions of other living creatures. Its water ring is made from seawater mixed with a sticky fluid that Finizen secretes from its blowhole. Its base stats are 70 HP, 45 Attack, 40 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 75 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 315. It has the abilities Water Veil. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 60.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Focus Energy (level 10), Aqua Jet (level 13), Double Hit (level 17), Dive (level 21), Charm (level 25), Acrobatics (level 29). It belongs to the Ground and Water2 egg groups.

title: Palafin zero
text: Palafin zero is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Dolphin Pokémon. It evolves from Finizen. This Pokémon changes its appearance if it hears its allies calling for help. Palafin will never show anybody its moment of transformation. Its physical capabilities are no different than a Finizen’s, but when its allies are in danger, it transforms and powers itself up. Its base stats are 100 HP, 70 Attack, 72 Defense, 53 Special Attack, 62 Special Defense, 100 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 457. It has the abilities Zero To Hero. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 60.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Double Hit (level 17), Dive (level 21), Charm (level 25), Acrobatics (level 29), Encore (level 34), Aqua Tail (level 39). It belongs to the Ground and Water2 egg groups.

title: Varoom
text: Varoom is a Steel and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Single-Cyl Pokémon. It is said that this Pokémon was born when an unknown poison Pokémon entered and inspirited an engine left at a scrap-processing factory. The steel section is Varoom’s actual body. This Pokémon clings to rocks and converts the minerals within into energy to fuel its activities. Its base stats are 45 HP, 70 Attack, 63 Defense, 30 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 47 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 300. It has the abilities Overcoat, with the hidden ability Slow Start. It stands 1.0 meters tall and weighs 35.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sludge (level 13), Gyro Ball (level 17), Headbutt (level 21), Screech (level 25), Iron Head (level 28), Swagger (level 32). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Revavroom
text: Revavroom is a Steel and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Multi-Cyl Pokémon. It evolves from Varoom. It creates a gas out of poison and minerals from rocks. It then detonates the gas in its cylinders—now numbering eight—to generate energy. Revavroom viciously threatens others with the sound of its exhaust. It sticks its tongue out from its cylindrical mouth and sprays toxic fluids. Its base stats are 80 HP, 119 Attack, 90 Defense, 54 Special Attack, 67 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 500. It has the abilities Overcoat, with the hidden ability Filter. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 120.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Sludge (level 13), Gyro Ball (level 17), Headbutt (level 21), Screech (level 25), Iron Head (level 28), Swagger (level 32). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Cyclizar
text: Cyclizar is a Dragon and Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Mount Pokémon. Apparently Cyclizar has been allowing people to ride on its back since ancient times. Depictions of this have been found in 10,000-year-old murals. It can sprint at over 70 mph while carrying a human. The rider’s body heat warms Cyclizar’s back and lifts the Pokémon’s spirit. Its base stats are 70 HP, 95 Attack, 65 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 121 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 501. It has the abilities Shed Skin, with the hidden ability Regenerator. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 63.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Breaking Swipe (level 14), Quick Attack (level 18), Bite (level 23), U Turn (level 27), Shed Tail (level 31), Dragon Claw (level 36). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Orthworm
text: Orthworm is a Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Earthworm Pokémon. When attacked, this Pokémon will wield the tendrils on its body like fists and pelt the opponent with a storm of punches. This Pokémon lives in arid deserts. It maintains its metal body by consuming iron from the soil. Its base stats are 70 HP, 85 Attack, 145 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 65 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 480. It has the abilities Earth Eater, with the hidden ability Sand Veil. It stands 2.5 meters tall and weighs 310.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Smack Down (level 12), Bulldoze (level 16), Iron Head (level 21), Take Down (level 26), Dig (level 30), Sandstorm (level 34). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Glimmet
text: Glimmet is a Rock and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ore Pokémon. It absorbs nutrients from cave walls. The petals it wears are made of crystallized poison. Glimmet’s toxic mineral crystals look just like flower petals. This Pokémon scatters poisonous powder like pollen to protect itself. Its base stats are 48 HP, 35 Attack, 42 Defense, 105 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 350. It has the abilities Toxic Debris, with the hidden ability Corrosion. It stands 0.7 meters tall and weighs 8.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Ancient Power (level 11), Rock Polish (level 15), Stealth Rock (level 18), Venoshock (level 22), Sandstorm (level 26), Self Destruct (level 29). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Glimmora
text: Glimmora is a Rock and Poison type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ore Pokémon. It evolves from Glimmet. When this Pokémon detects danger, it will open up its crystalline petals and fire beams from its conical body. Glimmora’s petals are made of crystallized poison energy. It has recently become evident that these petals resemble Tera Jewels. Its base stats are 83 HP, 55 Attack, 90 Defense, 130 Special Attack, 81 Special Defense, 86 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 525. It has the abilities Toxic Debris, with the hidden ability Corrosion. It stands 1.5 meters tall and weighs 45.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Ancient Power (level 11), Rock Polish (level 15), Stealth Rock (level 18), Venoshock (level 22), Sandstorm (level 26), Self Destruct (level 29). It belongs to the Mineral egg groups.

title: Greavard
text: Greavard is a Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ghost Dog Pokémon. It is said that a dog Pokémon that died in the wild without ever interacting with a human was reborn as this Pokémon. This friendly Pokémon doesn’t like being alone. Pay it even the slightest bit of attention, and it will follow you forever. Its base stats are 50 HP, 61 Attack, 60 Defense, 30 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 34 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 290. It has the abilities Pickup, with the hidden ability Fluffy. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 35.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Roar (level 9), Headbutt (level 12), Dig (level 16), Rest (level 24), Crunch (level 28), Play Rough (level 32). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Houndstone
text: Houndstone is a Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ghost Dog Pokémon. It evolves from Greavard. Houndstone spends most of its time sleeping in graveyards. Among all the dog Pokémon, this one is most loyal to its master. A lovingly mourned Pokémon was reborn as Houndstone. It doesn’t like anyone touching the protuberance atop its head. Its base stats are 72 HP, 101 Attack, 100 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 97 Special Defense, 68 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 488. It has the abilities Sand Rush, with the hidden ability Fluffy. It stands 2.0 meters tall and weighs 15.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Roar (level 9), Headbutt (level 12), Dig (level 16), Rest (level 24), Crunch (level 28), Play Rough (level 36). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Flamigo
text: Flamigo is a Flying and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Synchronize Pokémon. This Pokémon apparently ties the base of its neck into a knot so that energy stored in its belly does not escape from its beak. Thanks to a behavior of theirs known as “synchronizing,” an entire flock of these Pokémon can attack simultaneously in perfect harmony. Its base stats are 82 HP, 115 Attack, 74 Defense, 75 Special Attack, 64 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 500. It has the abilities Scrappy and Tangled Feet, with the hidden ability Costar. It stands 1.6 meters tall and weighs 37.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Focus Energy (level 15), Low Kick (level 18), Feint (level 21), Payback (level 27), Roost (level 31), Air Slash (level 35). It belongs to the Flying egg groups.

title: Cetoddle
text: Cetoddle is a Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Terra Whale Pokémon. This species left the ocean and began living on land a very long time ago. It seems to be closely related to Wailmer. It lives in frigid regions in pods of five or so individuals. It loves the minerals found in snow and ice. Its base stats are 108 HP, 68 Attack, 45 Defense, 30 Special Attack, 40 Special Defense, 43 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 334. It has the abilities Thick Fat and Snow Cloak, with the hidden ability Sheer Force. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 45.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rest (level 15), Take Down (level 19), Flail (level 25), Avalanche (level 27), Bounce (level 31), Body Slam (level 36). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Cetitan
text: Cetitan is a Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Terra Whale Pokémon. It evolves from Cetoddle. This Pokémon wanders around snowy, icy areas. It protects its body with powerful muscles and a thick layer of fat under its skin. Ice energy builds up in the horn on its upper jaw, causing the horn to reach cryogenic temperatures that freeze its surroundings. Its base stats are 170 HP, 113 Attack, 65 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 55 Special Defense, 73 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 521. It has the abilities Thick Fat and Slush Rush, with the hidden ability Sheer Force. It stands 4.5 meters tall and weighs 700.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Rest (level 15), Take Down (level 19), Flail (level 25), Avalanche (level 27), Bounce (level 31), Body Slam (level 36). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Veluza
text: Veluza is a Water and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Jettison Pokémon. When Veluza discards unnecessary flesh, its mind becomes honed and its psychic power increases. The spare flesh has a mild but delicious flavor. Veluza has excellent regenerative capabilities. It sheds spare flesh from its body to boost its agility, then charges at its prey. Its base stats are 90 HP, 102 Attack, 73 Defense, 78 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 478. It has the abilities Mold Breaker, with the hidden ability Sharpness. It stands 2.5 meters tall and weighs 90.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Water Pulse (level 11), Focus Energy (level 15), Slash (level 20), Aqua Cutter (level 25), Fillet Away (level 30), Night Slash (level 35). It belongs to the Water2 egg groups.

title: Dondozo
text: Dondozo is a Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Big Catfish Pokémon. This Pokémon is a glutton, but it’s bad at getting food. It teams up with a Tatsugiri to catch prey. It treats Tatsugiri like its boss and follows it loyally. Though powerful, Dondozo is apparently not very smart. Its base stats are 150 HP, 100 Attack, 115 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 35 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 530. It has the abilities Unaware and Oblivious, with the hidden ability Water Veil. It stands 12.0 meters tall and weighs 220.0 kilograms.
