Some of its notable moves include Dive (level 20), Noble Roar (level 25), Soak (level 30), Body Slam (level 35), Aqua Tail (level 40), Rain Dance (level 45). It belongs to the Water2 egg groups.

title: Tatsugiri curly
text: Tatsugiri curly is a Dragon and Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Mimicry Pokémon. This is a small dragon Pokémon. It lives inside the mouth of Dondozo to protect itself from enemies on the outside. Tatsugiri is an extremely cunning Pokémon. It feigns weakness to lure in prey, then orders its partner to attack. Its base stats are 68 HP, 50 Attack, 60 Defense, 120 Special Attack, 95 Special Defense, 82 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 475. It has the abilities Commander, with the hidden ability Storm Drain. It stands 0.3 meters tall and weighs 8.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Harden (level 6), Helping Hand (level 12), Water Pulse (level 17), Soak (level 23), Taunt (level 28), Memento (level 34). It belongs to the Water2 egg groups.

title: Annihilape
text: Annihilape is a Fighting and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Rage Monkey Pokémon. It evolves from Primeape. When its anger rose beyond a critical point, this Pokémon gained power that is unfettered by the limits of its physical body. It imbues its fists with the power of the rage that it kept hidden in its heart. Opponents struck by these imbued fists will be shattered to their core. Its base stats are 110 HP, 115 Attack, 80 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 90 Special Defense, 90 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 535. It has the abilities Vital Spirit and Inner Focus, with the hidden ability Defiant. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 56.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Swagger (level 17), Cross Chop (level 22), Assurance (level 26), Thrash (level 30), Rage Fist (level 35), Close Combat (level 39). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Clodsire
text: Clodsire is a Poison and Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Spiny Fish Pokémon. It evolves from Wooper. When attacked, this Pokémon will retaliate by sticking thick spines out from its body. It’s a risky move that puts everything on the line. It lives at the bottom of ponds and swamps. It will carry Wooper on its back and ferry them across water from one shore to the other. Its base stats are 130 HP, 75 Attack, 60 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 100 Special Defense, 20 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 430. It has the abilities Poison Point and Water Absorb, with the hidden ability Unaware. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 223.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Toxic Spikes (level 4), Mud Shot (level 8), Poison Tail (level 12), Slam (level 16), Yawn (level 21), Poison Jab (level 24). It belongs to the Water1 and Ground egg groups.

title: Farigiraf
text: Farigiraf is a Normal and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Long Neck Pokémon. It evolves from Girafarig. Now that the brain waves from the head and tail are synced up, the psychic power of this Pokémon is 10 times stronger than Girafarig’s. The hardened head from the tail protects the head of the main body as Farigiraf whips its long neck around to headbutt enemies. Its base stats are 120 HP, 90 Attack, 70 Defense, 110 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 60 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 520. It has the abilities Cud Chew and Armor Tail, with the hidden ability Sap Sipper. It stands 3.2 meters tall and weighs 160.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Assurance (level 10), Stomp (level 14), Psybeam (level 19), Agility (level 23), Double Hit (level 28), Twin Beam (level 32). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Dudunsparce two segment
text: Dudunsparce two segment is a Normal type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Land Snake Pokémon. It evolves from Dunsparce. This Pokémon uses its hard tail to make its nest by boring holes into bedrock deep underground. The nest can reach lengths of over six miles. It drives enemies out of its nest by sucking in enough air to fill its long, narrow lungs, then releasing the air in an intense blast. Its base stats are 125 HP, 100 Attack, 80 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 75 Special Defense, 55 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 520. It has the abilities Serene Grace and Run Away, with the hidden ability Rattled. It stands 3.6 meters tall and weighs 39.2 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Drill Run (level 24), Yawn (level 28), Hyper Drill (level 32), Roost (level 36), Dragon Rush (level 40), Coil (level 44). It belongs to the Ground egg groups.

title: Kingambit
text: Kingambit is a Dark and Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Big Blade Pokémon. It evolves from Bisharp. Only a Bisharp that stands above all others in its vast army can evolve into Kingambit. Though it commands a massive army in battle, it’s not skilled at devising complex strategies. It just uses brute strength to keep pushing. Its base stats are 100 HP, 135 Attack, 120 Defense, 60 Special Attack, 85 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 550. It has the abilities Defiant and Supreme Overlord, with the hidden ability Pressure. It stands 2.0 meters tall and weighs 120.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Scary Face (level 20), Assurance (level 25), Metal Sound (level 30), Slash (level 35), Night Slash (level 40), Iron Defense (level 45). It belongs to the Humanshape egg groups.

title: Great tusk
text: Great tusk is a Ground and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. The name Great Tusk was taken from a creature listed in a certain book. This creature resembles a mysterious Pokémon that, according to a paranormal magazine, has lived since ancient times. Its base stats are 115 HP, 131 Attack, 131 Defense, 53 Special Attack, 53 Special Defense, 87 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Protosynthesis. It stands 2.2 meters tall and weighs 320.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Brick Break (level 28), Stomping Tantrum (level 35), Knock Off (level 42), Earthquake (level 49), Giga Impact (level 56), Close Combat (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Scream tail
text: Scream tail is a Fairy and Psychic type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. There has been only one reported sighting of this Pokémon. It resembles a mysterious creature depicted in an old expedition journal. It resembles a mysterious Pokémon described in a paranormal magazine as a Jigglypuff from one billion years ago. Its base stats are 115 HP, 65 Attack, 99 Defense, 65 Special Attack, 115 Special Defense, 111 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Protosynthesis. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 8.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Body Slam (level 28), Rest (level 35), Play Rough (level 42), Hyper Voice (level 49), Psychic Fangs (level 56), Crunch (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Brute bonnet
text: Brute bonnet is a Grass and Dark type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. It is possible that the creature listed as Brute Bonnet in a certain book could actually be this Pokémon. It bears a slight resemblance to a Pokémon described in a dubious magazine as a cross between a dinosaur and a mushroom. Its base stats are 111 HP, 127 Attack, 99 Defense, 79 Special Attack, 99 Special Defense, 55 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Protosynthesis. It stands 1.2 meters tall and weighs 21.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Synthesis (level 21), Clear Smog (level 28), Payback (level 35), Thrash (level 42), Giga Drain (level 49), Sucker Punch (level 56). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Flutter mane
text: Flutter mane is a Ghost and Fairy type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. This Pokémon has characteristics similar to those of Flutter Mane, a creature mentioned in a certain book. It has similar features to a ghostly pterosaur that was covered in a paranormal magazine, but the two have little else in common. Its base stats are 55 HP, 55 Attack, 55 Defense, 135 Special Attack, 135 Special Defense, 135 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Protosynthesis. It stands 1.4 meters tall and weighs 4.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Wish (level 28), Dazzling Gleam (level 35), Shadow Ball (level 42), Mystical Fire (level 49), Power Gem (level 56), Psyshock (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Slither wing
text: Slither wing is a Bug and Fighting type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. This mysterious Pokémon has some similarities to a creature that an old book introduced as Slither Wing. This Pokémon somewhat resembles an ancient form of Volcarona that was introduced in a dubious magazine. Its base stats are 85 HP, 135 Attack, 79 Defense, 85 Special Attack, 105 Special Defense, 81 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Protosynthesis. It stands 3.2 meters tall and weighs 92.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Low Sweep (level 28), Morning Sun (level 35), Lunge (level 42), Superpower (level 49), Bulk Up (level 56), Dual Wingbeat (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Sandy shocks
text: Sandy shocks is a Electric and Ground type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. No records exist of this Pokémon being caught. Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with a creature shown in an expedition journal. It slightly resembles a Magneton that lived for 10,000 years and was featured in an article in a paranormal magazine. Its base stats are 85 HP, 81 Attack, 97 Defense, 121 Special Attack, 85 Special Defense, 101 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Protosynthesis. It stands 2.3 meters tall and weighs 60.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Tri Attack (level 28), Screech (level 35), Heavy Slam (level 42), Metal Sound (level 49), Discharge (level 56), Earth Power (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Iron treads
text: Iron treads is a Ground and Steel type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. This Pokémon closely resembles a scientific weapon that a paranormal magazine claimed was sent to this planet by aliens. Sightings of this Pokémon have occurred in recent years. It resembles a mysterious object described in an old expedition journal. Its base stats are 90 HP, 112 Attack, 120 Defense, 72 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 106 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Quark Drive. It stands 0.9 meters tall and weighs 240.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Iron Head (level 28), Stomping Tantrum (level 35), Knock Off (level 42), Earthquake (level 49), Heavy Slam (level 56), Wild Charge (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Iron bundle
text: Iron bundle is a Ice and Water type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. Its shape is similar to a robot featured in a paranormal magazine article. The robot was said to have been created by an ancient civilization. It resembles a mysterious object mentioned in an old book. There are only two reported sightings of this Pokémon. Its base stats are 56 HP, 80 Attack, 114 Defense, 124 Special Attack, 60 Special Defense, 136 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Quark Drive. It stands 0.6 meters tall and weighs 11.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Drill Peck (level 28), Helping Hand (level 35), Freeze Dry (level 42), Flip Turn (level 49), Ice Beam (level 56), Agility (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Iron hands
text: Iron hands is a Fighting and Electric type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. It is very similar to a cyborg covered exclusively by a paranormal magazine. The cyborg was said to be the modified form of a certain athlete. This Pokémon shares many similarities with Iron Hands, an object mentioned in a certain expedition journal. Its base stats are 154 HP, 140 Attack, 108 Defense, 50 Special Attack, 68 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Quark Drive. It stands 1.8 meters tall and weighs 380.7 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Slam (level 28), Force Palm (level 35), Seismic Toss (level 42), Charge (level 49), Wild Charge (level 56), Close Combat (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Iron jugulis
text: Iron jugulis is a Dark and Flying type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Paradox Pokémon. It resembles a certain Pokémon introduced in a paranormal magazine, described as the offspring of a Hydreigon that fell in love with a robot. It’s possible that Iron Jugulis, an object described in an old book, may actually be this Pokémon. Its base stats are 94 HP, 80 Attack, 86 Defense, 122 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 108 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 570. It has the abilities Quark Drive. It stands 1.3 meters tall and weighs 111.0 kilograms. Some of its notable moves include Dragon Breath (level 21), Snarl (level 28), Crunch (level 35), Hyper Voice (level 42), Air Slash (level 56), Knock Off (level 63). It belongs to the No Eggs egg groups.

title: Iron moth

Data is lacking, but the Pokémon’s traits match up with an object described in an old book. title: Frigibax
text: Frigibax is a Dragon and Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ice Fin Pokémon. Frigibax absorbs heat through its dorsal fin and converts the heat into ice energy. The higher the temperature, the more energy Frigibax stores. This Pokémon lives in forests and craggy areas. Using the power of its dorsal fin, it cools the inside of its nest like a refrigerator. Its base stats are 65 HP, 75 Attack, 45 Defense, 35 Special Attack, 45 Special Defense, 55 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 320. It has the abilities Thermal Exchange, with the hidden ability Ice Body. It stands 0.5 meters tall and weighs 17.0 kilograms. title: Arctibax
text: Arctibax is a Dragon and Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ice Fin Pokémon. It evolves from Frigibax. Arctibax freezes the air around it, protecting its face with an ice mask and turning its dorsal fin into a blade of ice. It attacks with the blade of its frozen dorsal fin by doing a front flip in the air. Arctibax’s strong back and legs allow it to pull off this technique. Its base stats are 90 HP, 95 Attack, 66 Defense, 45 Special Attack, 65 Special Defense, 62 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 423. It has the abilities Thermal Exchange, with the hidden ability Ice Body. It stands 0.8 meters tall and weighs 30.0 kilograms. It belongs to the Dragon and Mineral egg groups.

text: Baxcalibur is a Dragon and Ice type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Ice Dragon Pokémon. It evolves from Arctibax. This Pokémon blasts cryogenic air out from its mouth. This air can instantly freeze even liquid-hot lava. It launches itself into battle by flipping upside down and spewing frigid air from its mouth. It finishes opponents off with its dorsal blade. Its base stats are 115 HP, 145 Attack, 92 Defense, 75 Special Attack, 86 Special Defense, 87 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 600. title: Gimmighoul
text: Gimmighoul is a Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Coin Chest Pokémon. This Pokémon was born inside a treasure chest about 1,500 years ago. It sucks the life-force out of scoundrels who try to steal the treasure. It lives inside an old treasure chest. Sometimes it gets left in shop corners since no one realizes it’s actually a Pokémon. Its base stats are 45 HP, 30 Attack, 70 Defense, 75 Special Attack, 70 Special Defense, 10 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 300. It has the abilities Rattled. This Pokémon gets along well with others and is quick to make friends with anybody. It has a sturdy body made up of stacked coins. Gholdengo overwhelms its enemies by firing coin after coin at them in quick succession. title: Dipplin
text: Dipplin is a Grass and Dragon type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Candy Apple Pokémon. It evolves from Applin. Dipplin is two creatures in one Pokémon. Its evolution was triggered by a special apple grown only in one place. The head sticking out belongs to the fore-wyrm, while the tail belongs to the core-wyrm. The two share one apple and help each other out. Its base stats are 80 HP, 80 Attack, 110 Defense, 95 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 40 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 485. title: Poltchageist
text: Poltchageist is a Grass and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Matcha Pokémon. Supposedly, the regrets of a tea ceremony master who died before perfecting his craft lingered in some matcha and became a Pokémon. Poltchageist looks like a regional form of Sinistea, but it was recently discovered that the two Pokémon are entirely unrelated. Its base stats are 40 HP, 45 Attack, 45 Defense, 74 Special Attack, 54 Special Defense, 50 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 308. title: Sinistcha
text: Sinistcha is a Grass and Ghost type Pokemon introduced in Generation 9. It is known as the Matcha Pokémon. It evolves from Poltchageist. It pretends to be tea, trying to fool people into drinking it so it can drain their life-force. Its ruse is generally unsuccessful. It prefers cool, dark places, such as the back of a shelf or the space beneath a home's floorboards. It wanders in search of prey after sunset. Its base stats are 71 HP, 60 Attack, 106 Defense, 121 Special Attack, 80 Special Defense, 70 Speed, giving it a base stat total of 508. It can pulverize anything by swinging around the chain on its neck. title: Kirby
text: Kirby is a Fairy and Normal type Pokémon introduced in a hidden generation. It is known as the Star Warrior Pokémon. Kirby is a small pink hero from Dream Land who protects his friends using his unique ability to inhale enemies and copy their powers. This entry only appears for someone special.
